faqs.question: Is ISBR Business School Tier 1 or tier 2?
faqs.answer: ISBR Business School is generally considered a Tier 2 business school, although it is a well-regarded private institution with strong industry links and recognition in various surveys. It is approved by AICTE, AIU, and accredited by the NBA. ISBR is listed among the Top Business Schools of the Country and approved by AICTE, Ministry of HRD, Government of India.

faqs.question: Is ISBR Business School good or bad?
faqs.answer: ISBR Business School is a premier B school located in Electronic City, Bangalore. It is approved by AICTE, AIU, and accredited by the NBA. It is one of the academic units of ISBR Institutions. ISBR is listed among the Top Business Schools of the Country and approved by AICTE, Ministry of HRD, Government of India. According to the institute, the primary motive is to prepare students for life and establish them as leaders who are capable of influencing the world with their passion and success.

college_info.intro:
The ISBR Business School PGDM is the flagship programme of the institute and is highly sought-after among students, as the college is specialised for Management Education & Training and aims to develop students into leaders of tomorrow and entrepreneurs who are ready to take the new and challenging positions in top companies.
PGDM students at ISBR receive training in a curriculum that involves topics & subjects such as Economics for Managers, Marketing for Customer Value, Managerial Skills, etc. Students of the ISBR PGDM programme are also taught by expert faculty members who are industry professionals. Interested students can check a few student testimonies from ISBR Business School below:
Below mentioned are some of the other popular ISBR Business School courses and their respective eligibility and ISBR Business School fee:

placements.overview:
The ISBR Business School Placements 2025 have been concluded for the PGDM Class of 2025. According to the data available, the highest package offered at ISBR Bangalore during the 2025 placements stood at INR 16.42 LPA. Similarly, the average package stood at INR 8 LPA. Around 400 recruiters participated in the ISBR 2025 placements and made 311 job offers. The jobs were offered across more than 20 sectors such as BFSI, IT/ ITES, FMCG, Manufacturing and Retail, etc. with the overall placement rate being 92%.

ISBR Business School is visited by top companies for placements such as ANZ, Morgan Stanley, PwC, IDFC, RBL, Kasmo Global Consultancy, and others. The major highlights of ISBR PGDM Placements 2025 are tabulated below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, best college for PGDM course.

review_content.Placements: Our seniors have secured 90% placements from the college. Some top companies like Accenture, Aditya Birla Group, Deloitte, etc., have hired students from the university. The average amount awarded is 18 LPA, with the highest amount being 25 LPA. Students from finance and commerce have achieved the best results, and the other departments have achieved good performance as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college's amenities are amazing. Classroom has cooling systems. The motel is conveniently located near the campus and is very safe. Our college has good canteen facilities. We can engage with faculty members, other staff, and personnel. I never had any issues with my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. with ACCA - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is not at all worth the money paid.

review_content.Placements: I am in my last year. I looked for the internship myself. I hunt for job myself. The placement cell isn't satisfactory. The average salary package offered is around 2.5 LPA - 2.75 LPA. After spending lakhs, I came here on an education loan. It is now very hard for me.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is like it has two-floor buildings. It is just the same size as my school's auditorium. They have a good marketing strategy. They show business college building while applying for the college. We have studied in the law school. It is in a different building. Hostel life is the best for me in my days here. The food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: ISBR provides adaptive curriculum for students to become future leaders with all the facilities.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing my PGDM General in my 1st year. The percentage of students placed is 92%. The highest package offered is 16LPA, and the average package ranges between 7 to 8LPA. The eminent companies coming to campus are Accenture, ANZ, Federal Bank, Swiggy, HCL Technologies, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus is well equipped with AC classrooms, smartboards, free Wi-Fi, and a Library. There is an amphitheatre and a spacious auditorium for cultural events. College also provides hostel facilities, which are also equipped with well furnished rooms with 24/7 Wi-Fi service and CCTV surveillance.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best placement records with industry faculty and nice professors. Advanced infrastructure

review_content.Placements: Placement record - 94-99%. Packages offered: Highest: 15 lac, Avg: 7.5 lac, Lowest: 4.5 lac. Top recruiters: Accenture, Wipro, TCS, Infosys, Deloitte, HCL. Almost 100% of students get internships in companies like JP Morgan, Morgan Stanley, HDFC, ICICI, Nestlé, Coca-Cola, etc. Top roles offered: Investor bankers, marketing manager, product manager, HR manager, operations manager, supply chain manager, management consultant, data scientist, financial analyst, portfolio manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: Advanced classrooms, nice turf and indoor games area on the terrace. Nice faculty. Food is almost good (it's about different regions, different foods). Good medical facilities. Good sports events and tournaments. Wi-Fi available. Advanced labs and library. AC, advanced benches with charging points, big screens, movable boards, projectors, cafeteria with variety of items.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Best faculty, average placements in 2023, and above-average infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placement Cell provides twice as much training for internships as well as placement. We have seen the T&P officer's efforts; he is trying his best. Still, sometimes unexpected things happen. Placement this year dropped drastically, and some students passed out only with internships, mostly for our HR specialization. Corizo is offering internships. In the last 3 months, most students have been placed some off-campus as well, but we need to admit that this year, the college failed to deliver 100% placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is very small. Our library is also small and very few events happen in the auditorium. All classrooms have cameras and ACs. The teachers also monitor students activities. Yes, Wi-Fi is available on campus but sometimes browsing speeds are only 50 kbps, which is very slow. ISBR has its own hostel; they provide a president like a home warden. The hostel is separated for girls and boys. Separate dining hall for eating mess food. Sports are very rare, and sports kits are in bad condition. The canteen is good, but as a student, I do not get any medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: ISBR: where your dream becomes reality.

review_content.Placements: Placement is good. The college placement cell creates one WhatsApp group for our 2024 batch and posts job openings on campus. Most companies eligibility criteria are 65% in 12th grade, a minimum of 60% in graduation and 65% in PGDM without active backlogs. Some students do not fulfill this criteria. Many big firms, like HDFC Life, Bajaj, ICiCI, AU Small Finance, Motilal Oswal, and Kotak Mahindra, conduct online hiring drives. Assessment is online, but interviews are face-to-face. 100% of the students who fulfilled this criteria got placed with a good average package of 7.5 lacs. Roles are mostly dependent on the company.

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of ISBR must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at ISBR is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of ISBR admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 65,000 - 12,50,000 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at ISBR.

admission_overview.college_name: ISBR Business School Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Cutoff, Eligibility, Selection Process

admission_overview.title: ISBR Business School Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ISBR Bangalore admission 2026 admission 2026 is ongoing for PGDM and MBA through Early Round and Regular Rounds from September of the corresponding year. The college offers various courses at UG, PG and diploma levels. The ISBR Bangalore application process can be completed in online mode. To gain admissions into the ISBR Bangalore undergraduate level courses, candidates are required to clear their Class 12 board exams with a minimum aggregate of 50% and have the relevant mandatory subjects. For postgraduate level, candidates must clear their undergraduate programs in the relevant fields. Additionally, for admission to its flagship courses MBA and PGDM, the institute conducts and accepts various entrance exams such as ISBR Aptitude Test, CAT / XAT / NMAT / MAT / CMATmand many others.

admission_process.title: ISBR Business School Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: ISBR Bangaloreadmission process 2026 contains multiple steps. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to follow all the steps. The admission is entrance followed by a Micro presentation and PI round to its courses. Want to know complete details about theISBR Bangaloreadmission process 2026,go through the following section.
1: ISBR Bangalore Application Process
Candidates looking for admission to any courses atISBR Bangaloreare required to visit the college's official website to fill out the application form.
2: Selection and Counselling Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates are required to apply and appear for one entrance exam accepted by the college for admission to PGDM. The exams includeCAT / XAT / NMAT / MAT / CMAT.Additionally for other courses, the college conductsISBR Aptitude Test followed byMicro Presentation andPersonal Interview.
3: Final Seat Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted in the Micro Presentation and Personal Interview. The selected candidates must make the ISBR Bangalore fee payment within the given deadline to secure their seats.

courses_data.name: ISBR Bangalore PGDM Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, NMAT, ATMA, XAT, KMAT, Karnataka PGCET, CMAT, CAT
courses_data.description: ISBR Bangalore offers MBA and PGDM for a duration of two years each. PGDM is offered in various specialisations, namely Data Science and Business Analytics, Product Management, General, Sports Management, etc. Candidates must complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for ISBR MBA course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for PGDM course at ISBR Business School?
faqs.answer: Candidates should complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for ISBR Bangalore admission. Apart from academic requirements, aspirants also need to qualify one of the accepted entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, etc. Only after fulfiling the eligibility requirements, candidates will be able to fill out the application form. The mode of application is online.

faqs.question: Does ISBR Bangalore accept MAT scores for admission to PGDM programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, ISBR Bangalore accepts a valid score of MAT to offer admission to PGDM aspirants. Candidate must obtain minimum of 650 marks out of 800. Candidates who secure this score have to perform well in other selection rounds such as WAT (Written Ability Test), Micro Presentation and Personal Interview. Apart from this, candidate have a valid score in either CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ CMAT are also eligible to apply for this course.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations offered by ISBR Business School for PGDM course?
faqs.answer: The specialisations offered by ISBR Business School for PGDM course is mentioned below:PGDM – HR, Finance, Marketing, Operations, Information Science, International Business, Retail, Travel & Tourism, E Banking & Financial Services, Sports Management, Business Analytics, Digital MarketingPGDM in Product ManagementPGDM in Fin Tech and New Age Financial ServicesPGDM in Data Science and Business AnalyticsPGDM with One Semester AbroadGlobal PGDM – Tri Country ProgramPGDM in Health Care Management

faqs.question: Is PGDM available at ISBR Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Yes, ISBR Bangalore offers PGDM for a duration of two-years. PGDM is an AICTE approved course offered by the institute. Below are the PGDM courses offered at ISBR:PGDM GeneralData Science and Business AnalyticsProduct ManagementGlobal PGDM-Three CountryPGDM with One Semester AbroadInternational Study TripSports Management

faqs.question: Is it worth joining ISBR Bangalore?
faqs.answer: ISBR Bangalore placement has concluded for the PGDMClass of 2025. As per the latest report, over225 recruitersparticipated in the placement process and offered311 job offersto the PGDM Class of 2025. Thehighest and average packageoffered during ISBR Bangalore placement in 2025 wereINR 16.42 LPA and INR 8 LPA,respectively.The participating recruiters presented new-age jobs to the batch 2025 acrossmore than 20 sectorsincluding BFSI, Retail & Manufacturing, IT/ITES, FMCG, etc. Thetop recruiterswho participated during the 2025 placement session atISBR BangaloreincludedANZ,Morgan Stanley, PwC, IDFC, RBL, Kasmo Global Consultancy, etc.

faqs.question: Is the admission to BCom programme open at ISBR Bangalore?
faqs.answer: ISBR Bangalore BCom admisionsareopen. Candidates interested in admission to the college can apply online through the official website of the college. The institute has not yet declared  the last date to apply for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get into ISBR Bangalore with 80 percentile in CAT?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to ISBR Bangalore with 80% through CAT can easily get admission. This is because, as per the ISBR Bangalore cutoff 2024, the CAT percentile stood at 75%, which is quite lower than the percentile acquired which can make a fair chance for you to get admission to ISBR Bangalore. Candidates can check out more exams' cutoff fromISBR Karnatakaofficial cutoff page.

placement_data.title: ISBR Bangalore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: ISBR Bangalore placement has concluded for the PGDM Class of 2025. As per the latest report, over 400 recruiters participated in the placement process and offered 311 job offers to the PGDM Class of 2025. The highest and average package offered during ISBR Bangalore placement in 2025 were INR 16.42 LPA and INR 8 LPA, respectively . The placement rate recorded during the recent placement season was 92% . The participating recruiters presented new-age jobs to the batch 2025 across more than 20 sectors including BFSI, Retail & Manufacturing, IT/ITES, FMCG, etc. The top recruiters who participated during the 2025 placement session at ISBR Bangalore included ANZ , Morgan Stanley, PwC, IDFC, RBL, Kasmo Global Consultancy , etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered in ISBR Bangalore PGDM?
faqs.answer: ISBR Bangalore conducts placements for PGDM students. In the final year, students can participate in the placement drive. Internship opportunities are also available during the degree. ISBR Bangalore has released the summer internship report 2023 for the PGDM programme. As per the report, the the highest stipend and average stipend offered to ISBR Bangalore PGDM students stood at INR 30, 000 per month and INR 15,000 per month, respectively. Further, the the highest and average package offered during ISBR Bangalore PGDM placements 2022 stood at INR 14 LPA and INR 8 LPA, respectively.

description: ISBR cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

ISBR Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 28913 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 13640 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at ISBR. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 28913 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 6995.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.
ISBR accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

hostel_campus.college_name: ISBR Business School Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
ISBR Group offers hostel facilities for both boys and girls. Hostels are offered on a twin/ three sharing basis with all amenities. Hostel rooms are allotted on a first come first serve basis. Hostel rooms are available on twin sharing basis with an attached bath. Single occupancy rooms are subject to availability. Hostel rooms are furnished with Cupboard, Bed, Mattress, Study table, Chair, and TV. Vegetarian meals served - Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner.
Boys Hostel Number of beds - 150| on twin sharing basis, Girls Hostel Number of beds - 150|on twin sharing basis  Single Occupancy for Boys  – 20 beds  Single Occupancy for Girls – 20 beds

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for PGDM course.
reviews.review_text: Our college's amenities are amazing. Classroom has cooling systems. The motel is conveniently located near the campus and is very safe. Our college has good canteen facilities. We can engage with faculty members, other staff, and personnel. I never had any issues with my college.

reviews.review_heading: It is not at all worth the money paid.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is like it has two-floor buildings. It is just the same size as my school's auditorium. They have a good marketing strategy. They show business college building while applying for the college. We have studied in the law school. It is in a different building. Hostel life is the best for me in my days here. The food is good.

reviews.review_heading: ISBR provides adaptive curriculum for students to become future leaders with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is well equipped with AC classrooms, smartboards, free Wi-Fi, and a Library. There is an amphitheatre and a spacious auditorium for cultural events. College also provides hostel facilities, which are also equipped with well furnished rooms with 24/7 Wi-Fi service and CCTV surveillance.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best placement records with industry faculty and nice professors. Advanced infrastructure
reviews.review_text:
Advanced classrooms, nice turf and indoor games area on the terrace.
Nice faculty.
Food is almost good (it's about different regions, different foods).
Good medical facilities.
Good sports events and tournaments.
Wi-Fi available.
Advanced labs and library.
AC, advanced benches with charging points, big screens, movable boards, projectors, cafeteria with variety of items.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty, average placements in 2023, and above-average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is very small. Our library is also small and very few events happen in the auditorium. All classrooms have cameras and ACs. The teachers also monitor students activities. Yes, Wi-Fi is available on campus but sometimes browsing speeds are only 50 kbps, which is very slow. ISBR has its own hostel; they provide a president like a home warden. The hostel is separated for girls and boys. Separate dining hall for eating mess food. Sports are very rare, and sports kits are in bad condition....

reviews.review_heading: ISBR: where your dream becomes reality.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in Electronic City, where there are many corporate offices and huge traffic. Almost all transportation modes are available. The college infrastructure is good, with a big garden and sports field. The college has its own Wi-Fi service for student and staff usage. Labs like the study lab, PC lab, and practical lab in college. The college library is big and has a lot of books, both academic and non-academic. The college has a partner with stanza living for the accommodation ...

reviews.review_heading: The best and the finest college: ISBR college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is really good. You'll get single-furnished rooms. The hostel is compulsory for PGP1 students and you get in during the time of registration. Facilities like washing machines, geysers, daily cleaning, etc. are available. The food service at our hostel is also very good .

reviews.review_heading: Don't be serious. Enjoy your college days.
reviews.review_text: Our campus seems a little bit small. One bad news is that there is no annual fest held in our college. Full campus is under CCTV surveillance and classrooms have ACs and boards. Library has a big collection of reference books. Hostel is not owned by the college. You cannot find good meals even after paying 12.5k per month. Sports facilities are very less and no medical facilities are given by the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. The hostel has double and triple-sharing rooms. Hostel seats are ample. A few are day scholars. The hostel deposit fee is Rs. 2,00,000 per annum. The food served in the hostel is not much good. All the rooms have free housekeeping facilities, Wi-Fi, and power backup. The hostel has a separate gymnasium, a games room, rehearsal rooms, a swimming pool, a microwave, and a laundry room. The hostel is located about 5 km from the school premises. The bus fa...

reviews.review_heading: Review of ISBR Business School.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty good. They have air-conditioned classrooms, a library, an auditorium, and a 24X7 Wi-Fi facility. It has an average canteen as well. They are also building new infrastructure that will add value to the campus and provide ease to students.

reviews.review_heading: ISBR student life Summary.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure available at the disposal of the students at ISBR are Library, Smart classrooms, Bloomberg terminal and the likes. However, improvements need to be made to certain devices and the infrastructure as well as there are certain areas which need improvement. Hostels are clean and hygienic, and are connected to gyms and other recreational centres.

reviews.review_heading: An industry oriented institution with tremendous faculty members across multiple domains.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is currently being revamped. The library is very informative and contains subscriptions to reputed journals across the world. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and air-conditioning as well. There are multiple Wi-Fi receptors across the building.

reviews.review_heading: Good platform to excel, holistic approach towards Post graduation .
reviews.review_text: New building is being constructed and hostel is stanza living uniworld. The distance between hostel and college is 2kms for which bus is provided by the college itself. And the college has Bloomberg terminal and Harvard case studies are discussed.

reviews.review_heading: The college is above my expectations, the faculty members are coherent in their competence.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent but the location of the college is in Electronic City which is a hub for corporates and startups, hostel facility is also very nice, it is provided by stanza living which is 1 km away from college, so there is a bus for pickup and drop provided by college.

reviews.review_heading: Review about ISBR Business School.
reviews.review_text: There is no Hostel as such in the college but the college has tied up with Stanza Living Amsterdam House for the Hostel like services. Stanza has around 900+ people from different backgrounds and it's like a PG. ISBR has a different block as their hostel. You get to interact with a lot of people.

data.description: ISBR Business School is one of the premier institutions of Bangalore and hence draws a large number of students from all parts of India. The concern for the outstation students, after securing admission is the availability of a safe and comfortable accommodation. In order to meet the requirements of such students ISBR Business School offers separate hostel facilities for both male and female students.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about ISBR Business School

likes.text: The top recruiting companies are ANZ, Hexaware, Flipkart, Dell, Markets &Markets, Loreal, PwC, Grant Thornton, DHL, Dun and Bradstreet, and Adecco.
The placement record of ISBR is very good, and it caters very well to the needs of students and job roles they aspire.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is Haryana's top university for medical students.

review_content.Placements: There are 82 students in our class. There is a competitive exam for a job as a nursing officer. The only benefit we have is that there is a tertiary-level hospital in which we get the required practice. It provides 6 months internship in the 8th semester of our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that great as our college is very old. There is a 24x7 library cum reading hall for all students. There is no Wi-Fi. The hostel is provided to us which is 3, 2 and single seater for 1st, 2nd, 3rd and final years respectively. Mess food is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My College, a Heaven on Earth.

review_content.Placements: Actually, our college is a medical college, and placement activities are not done on our campus. But during the internship, we got a stipend of about 24 thousand per month for one year. The main roles offered by our college are being a medical officer and other doctor positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and other facilities related to technology are well-organized and very good. We have a modular operation theatre, trauma center with all the newly discovered machines, which are helpful in the treatment of patients. There is one sports ground on our campus with separate grounds for games.

review_summary.college_name: PGIMS Rohtak Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Haryana in view of fees and faculty but just hostels needed.

content.Placements: There are 66 students in our batch. The placements are just decent, the average package offered is 5 LPA. The highest package is around 18 to 20 LPA including home visits. Depends on your skills and the area in which you are getting placed. Government job opportunities are not much in this field.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is just average, not very impressive. The sitting facility is also not very decent considering the number of students. Library is very good and provides us with sufficient resources, but there is no Wi-Fi facility for the students anywhere on the campus. Canteen is very good and the prices are also minimal. Enough sports opportunities are provided to the students. Fests are also organised to enhance sports activities. In the view of medical facilities, this is the best institute in the area. Hostels are not provided to us for 3 to 4 batches.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very happy after getting admission at this college.

content.Placements: Beating one of the prestigious institutes, its almost all students get placements. The average package after MBBS is almost 10 LPA to 15 LPA. There are many companies that recruit students radically related to medicine. After just MBBS best role is being an medical officer in medicine.
content.Infrastructure: This college was established in mid 20s century so the buildings were old. But there are all the facilities of labs and library present. Talking about hostel, it is also an old building which needs to be improved a lot. Also I do not like the hostel food but other facilities sports and canteen are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is Haryana's top university for medical students.

The hostel is provided to us which is 3, 2 and single seater for 1st, 2nd, 3rd and final years respectively. Mess food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Haryana.

content.Placements: All students graduating from PGIMS Rohtak got government jobs. It is the best college for placements. There are many job options even in private hospitals, and you will not regret taking admission to B.Sc. OT at PGIMS Rohtak. You can even pursue your career in foreign countries.
content.Infrastructure: PGIMS Rohtak has the best infrastructure with modern and advanced machines. It has the best faculty; the teachers are highly qualified and supportive. It has the best hostel facilities, but sadly, it’s not available for paramedical courses like B.Sc. OT and other courses.

admission_process.title: PGIMS Rohtak Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: PGIMS Rohtak admissionis merit-based. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. Selection to the offered programmes is entirely based on the academic score of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. To secure admission at PGIMS Rohtak, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process atPGIMS Rohtakis conducted online. Read the article to know more about the PGIMS Rohtak course admission 2025. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
PGIMS Rohtak Fees: The total tuition fee for UG ranges betweenINR 24,000 - 3,60,000. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
PGIMS Rohtak Duration: The duration of the UG courses is 54 months - 4 years. The duration of PG courses is 2 years - 3 years.

description: PGIMS Rohtak cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

PGIMS Rohtak cut off 2025 across different exams, courses, and categories will be released soon. Meanwhile, aspirants seeking admission to PGIMS Rohtak for MD and MS courses can click on the download now link below to view the past three years' NEET PG cutoff ranks for different categories.

PGIMS Rohtak NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 7588 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

PGIMS Rohtak MBBS cutoff 2025 was 7588 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 9920 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

PGIMS Rohtak accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

PGIMS Rohtak NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 27521 to 117497. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the PGIMS Rohtak MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Anaesthesiology, followed by MD in Physiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 27521 and 117497, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In the first round, PGIMS Rohtak DM cutoff 2024 ranged from 13 to 1197 for students in the General AI category. was the toughest to get into. turned out to be the most easiest for admission.

The Round 3 cutoff for admission to the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) was 7529 for the General HS quota. For the OBC category candidates, the cutoff rank for the same course stood at 15375. hostel_campus.college_name: PGIMS Rohtak Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Haryana in view of fees and faculty but just hostels needed.
reviews.review_text: The college building is just average, not very impressive. The sitting facility is also not very decent considering the number of students. Library is very good and provides us with sufficient resources, but there is no Wi-Fi facility for the students anywhere on the campus. Canteen is very good and the prices are also minimal. Enough sports opportunities are provided to the students. Fests are also organised to enhance sports activities. In the view of medical facilities, this is the best insti...

reviews.review_heading: Very happy after getting admission at this college.
reviews.review_text: This college was established in mid 20s century so the buildings were old. But there are all the facilities of labs and library present. Talking about hostel, it is also an old building which needs to be improved a lot. Also I do not like the hostel food but other facilities sports and canteen are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is Haryana's top university for medical students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that great as our college is very old. There is a 24x7 library cum reading hall for all students. There is no Wi-Fi. The hostel is provided to us which is 3, 2 and single seater for 1st, 2nd, 3rd and final years respectively. Mess food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: My College, a Heaven on Earth.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and other facilities related to technology are well-organized and very good. We have a modular operation theatre, trauma center with all the newly discovered machines, which are helpful in the treatment of patients. There is one sports ground on our campus with separate grounds for games.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: PGIMS Rohtak has the best infrastructure with modern and advanced machines. It has the best faculty; the teachers are highly qualified and supportive. It has the best hostel facilities, but sadly, it’s not available for paramedical courses like B.Sc. OT and other courses.

reviews.review_heading: I feel very grateful after getting this prestigious college for the prestigious course MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good in my college, as the buildings are too old and urgently need renovation. Labs are also complete but lacking modern instruments. The hostel building is also getting too old, and there is always a risk to life for those students living in hostel rooms. The mess food is good, and the canteen is also near the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Curriculum is boring, there are no placement or hostel facilities.Events and festival are wonderful.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is just fine. There are no difficulties in the lecture theatre and labs. These are well-maintained, but not very impressive. Wi-Fi is provided on the campus, but it is only available in the computer lab and instruments lab, not in the lecture theatre. There is currently no hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: SBDS College of Nursing, Aherwan, Ratia.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, and almost all facilities are provided. Classrooms are well maintained. There is a library in our college, which is open only during college hours, and there are many good books related to nursing. Canteen facilities are also provided. The hostel is only for girls.

reviews.review_heading: FIRST YEAR IN PGIMS, Rohtak.
reviews.review_text: You will get every chance to improve yourself in extracurricular activities like sports, cultural events, etc., as all required resources are available. Even during fests, the seniors will step ahead to cooperate with you. The infrastructure of classrooms, lecture theatres, OPD, and all is quite fine. Every student will get equal attention in D-Hall. The only drawback is that the hostel infrastructure and food are not that good. But there is a vital booth in every corner and a Fiesta canteen for...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because here we got a lot of practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not provided by the college to B.Sc. Optometry students. Medical facilities are good at Pt. Bd Sharma Rohtak. Labs and classrooms are well-furnished. There is a large library in the college for students, with books related to different courses.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B Pharmacy in the PGMIS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so well developed, but it is well maintained and helps in providing knowledge. The hostels are not so good and are not maintained well. Hostel infrastructure is very old; the walls are very horrible. Labs are in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, but cannot recommend it due to limited future opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not so good. PGIMS Rohtak was built many years ago and some buildings are in bad condition. Some of the labs are just good. New buildings have all the facilities, like the latest lab equipment and ACs but some buildings are just average.

reviews.review_heading: If you are comfortable with university criteria then take your admission.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities and infrastructure, like Wi-Fi connection, are not good. Classrooms and labs are good and clean. Other facilities, such as hostels, mess, medical services, and playground, are available. Many sports and games are arranged by the university for us. Regarding our canteen, there are many varieties and high-quality foods available.

reviews.review_heading: Go and take your admission if you like here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connections are really bad, not working properly. Classrooms and labs are cleaned every day. Other facilities like hostels and mess are available. A variety of foods are available in the canteen. Quality of food is average. Medical facilities and many sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: If your all needs are matched then go for take admission.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connections work, but not all the time. Labs and classrooms are good and clean. Many books are available in our library. Hostel and mess are available and clean every day. A variety of foods are available in our canteen. Medical facilities, sports, games, and playgrounds are available.

college_info.intro:
Integral University comprises of more than 20 departments, including Agriculture, Engineering, Management, Health Science, and others. The affilated college and departments of the university provides a wide range of courses at the UG, PG and PhD courses across various streams. BTech and MBA are the popular programmes.
Integral University offers BTech programme for the duration of four-years. The institute offers BTech course in Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Civil Engineering, CSE, Electrical Engineering, Food Technology, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Integral University is a two-year programme. It is offered in Health Care Management, Economics & Business, Supply Chain Management, and others. review_summary.college_name: Integral University Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the faculty and also with the university system.

content.Placements: If we talk about placements, then we can't get anything from college. We can't even get anything with the help of faculty members. We have to do everything on our own. We have to make many efforts to secure a placement or take a job because the placement rate is only on paper, and there's nothing like getting a good placement and a good job with 30 or 40 LPA in BCA at Integral University. After admission, they say only one thing, that it's our own responsibility to get a job, and they can't do anything if we are an average student.
content.Infrastructure: We do not get any facilities for 1.5 lakhs, as it's the charge for 1 year of stay in the hostel. The hostel does not have AC. We don't get a single almirah or single B.Ed or anything else. It does not have a Wi-Fi system. There is no mess system included in it, and we have to give extra charges for the mess system. We don't have access to go out or in anytime we want. The room area is full of dust, or we can say the paint on the walls is very old. It has scratches. There is no single cleaner in the hostel building.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college gave good placements.

content.Placements: The placement of our university is very good. There are many companies that recruit students from our university at the best package prices. The top companies' names are Flipkart, HCL, Teach, Amazon, Mahindra, and many other companies like Paytm and Google Pay.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of labs and classrooms are good, and the Wi-Fi network is also very good. The library is not very good, the facilities of the hostel are quite bad, and the food in the hostel is also poor. The ground is very good at our university, and many sports are played there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Amazing, and most of the students are satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: In the last 4–5 years, in my course, the percentage of students who got placed is 67 percent. The highest package is 12 LPA, the average is 7 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The companies are Tata, Google, Flipkart, Sierra, and Techno. At least 12–15 students got placed in Flipkart, and some in Tata.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is great, with privacy and security at their best. The food in the hostel is hygienic and tasty. They have a very dynamic schedule for dinner, lunch, and breakfast, and they also provide snacks every evening around 5 pm. The rooms are well cleaned and have good bed quality. They also provide medical facilities and a sports complex.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the university is excellent. Faculty members are good, but the placement rate is low.

content.Placements: The average package is about 2.5–3 LPA. Companies visit, but not very frequently. Overall, the placement rate is good compared to other universities in Lucknow. However, if you only want placement, you should consider a university other than Integral University.
content.Infrastructure: My course is B.Sc. Biotechnology, and its fee is Rs. 90,000 per year. Hostel fees are separate and vary according to the type of room you choose. Mainly, two kinds of rooms are available here. They are AC and non-AC. The rooms are triple-sharing. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, microphones, and speakers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you are serious about your studies, then you can study here otherwise, you cannot.

content.Placements: In my knowledge, only 10 to 15% get the placement. The highest placement of 2024 is 34 LPA. Top recruiting company in this college is TCS. Many students get paid internships, only 10 to 15% and the remaining 50% are unpaid. Top roles offered in our course are Software Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the labs, and AC is also available. Every classroom department has its library, and there is a Central library where you can study. The quality of the hostel is very good. Food is average, and the mess is there. All medical facilities, sports, and games are also available.

admission_overview.college_name: Integral University Lucknow Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Integral University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IUL admissions 2025are bothmeritandentrance-based. It offers various courses at the UG, PG, PhD, and diploma levels in various fields.Integral University Lucknowconducts its entrance exam, i.e.,Integral University Entrance Test (IUET), which is conducted commonly for admission to its various UG and PG courses (exceptBArch & MBBS, MD/MS). Students can also getadmission via other state/national-level entrance examsfor the respective courses.
Integral University Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Integral University offers courses through its12 academic facultiesincluding Law, Engineering & IT, and Pharmacy. Selection to these courses is based on theIUET examscore. Admission to theBArchprogramme is accepted based on a valid score inNATA/UPSEE/ JEEmains. For final admission, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria related to some of theIntegral University courses:
Class 12 with 45% aggregate inPhysics, Chemistry & Maths/ Biology
Class 12 with 45% aggregate with Physics,Chemistry, English/ Mathematics
Class 12 with 50% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry &Biology
Class 12 with 45% aggregate
Graduation with 50% aggregate in any stream 'or'
Pass BTech with 55% aggregate
UG degree in BSc with 50% aggregate
Class 12 with 50% aggregate
Class 12 with 50% aggregate
NEET+ UPDGME Counselling

Integral University fees range between INR 30,000 and INR 9.6 lakh.Architecturestudents also need to pay theNIASA fee of INR 200, and the Educational Tour Fee ofINR 1,200. Thecaution feepaid by the students at the time of admission shall berefundedafter the completionof the course.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the major reasons why students drop a degree or a college. While the availability of student loans and financial aid has made education accessible, the eligibility required to qualify for a loan or a scholarship often stands as a challenge. Below areIntegral University tuition feesalong with average package details for some of the courses:
INR 3.5 lakh
INR 80,000 - INR 3.2 lakh
INR 3 - INR 9.3 lakh
INR 2.4 lakh - INR 3.2 lakh
INR 76.5 lakh

Apart from past academic performance and entrance exam scores, admission to Integral University is also determined by seat availability. The seat number is not very high at Integral University programmes so the candidates seeking admission to this university should score high in the entrance exam. Check out below the number of seats for a few programmes at Integral University Lucknow:

Integral University Seats Reservation 2025:At Integral University,50%of the total seats are reserved forMuslim minoritiesand 50% of the seats are available for the general category. Female students, PwD and NRI reservations are also present.
Note:Above information is taken from the official website and may vary..

Integral University Lucknow admissions 2025 are bothmerit and entrance-based. Applications of the candidates whosequalifying exams(such as IUET) arerecognised by the universitywill only be considered at the time of admission. IUET, a computer-based exam, will be held at the University campus. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around Integral University admissions 2025:
1. Integral University Application

Candidates applying for admission to courses offered at Integral University are required tofill application form either in online or offline mode. Candidates have to fill the form with basic details such as personal and educational information. Along with that, they also have to submit the relevant documents and pay an application fee before submitting the form.
2. Selection Rounds

For the selection of eligible applicants, the university accepts scores of various state national-level entrance exams. Candidates can also appear for theIUET exam, which is conducted by the university itself. The aspirants must qualify for any one of the entrance exams to qualify the Integral University selection process.
3. Final Admission

After the completion of all selection rounds, candidates will be evaluated based on their past academic scores and scores of the respective entrance exams. Later on, the university will release the merit list of the selected candidates. Candidates whose names appeared on the merit list must pay acertain amount of feeto confirm their seats.

courses_data.description: A full-time MBBS course is offered at Integral University. Admissions to this course are given on a total of 150 seats. A valid NEET UG score is considered for admission. The selected candidates have to pay a tuition fee of INR 76.5 lakh.

faqs.question: Who can apply to MBBS at Integral university?
faqs.answer: To be eligible to apply for MBBS course at Integral University, candidates must pass the minimum eligibility criteria as per the course requirements. Those who pass Class 12 in Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, and Biology) from a recognised school and fulfil all the guidelines determined by the National Medical Council (NMC) are eligible to apply for the course. Candidates have to submit their marksheet/ scorecard of Class 12 at the time of applying for the course.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to MBBS at Integral University without NEET UG?
faqs.answer: No, diect admission is not possible for admission to MBBS at Integral University. Candidates aspiring to get a seat in MBBS at Integral University must qualify for NEET UG entrance exam conducted by NTA with a valid score. Without a valid NEET UG score, candidates will not be selected for the course. Further, only the entrance exam qualifiers will be able to apply for UP NEET UG Counselling process for the seat allotment.

courses_data.description: A full-time MBBS course is offered at Integral University. Admissions to this course are given on a total of 150 seats. A valid NEET UG score is considered for admission. The selected candidates have to pay a tuition fee of INR 76.5 lakh.

faqs.question: Who can apply to MBBS at Integral university?
faqs.answer: To be eligible to apply for MBBS course at Integral University, candidates must pass the minimum eligibility criteria as per the course requirements. Those who pass Class 12 in Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, and Biology) from a recognised school and fulfil all the guidelines determined by the National Medical Council (NMC) are eligible to apply for the course. Candidates have to submit their marksheet/ scorecard of Class 12 at the time of applying for the course.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to MBBS at Integral University without NEET UG?
faqs.answer: No, diect admission is not possible for admission to MBBS at Integral University. Candidates aspiring to get a seat in MBBS at Integral University must qualify for NEET UG entrance exam conducted by NTA with a valid score. Without a valid NEET UG score, candidates will not be selected for the course. Further, only the entrance exam qualifiers will be able to apply for UP NEET UG Counselling process for the seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is fees for MBBS at Integral University?
faqs.answer: The tuition fees for MBBS course at Integral University is INR 76.5 lakh. Other than this, candidates have to pay for hostel fee and one-time refundable caution deposit. However, this fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Integral University MBBS fees.

faqs.question: When will the IUET be conducted?
faqs.answer: The details of the IUET exam date and time are made available on the official website of Integral University.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Integral University for BPharm?
faqs.answer: To get admission to a four-year BPharm course at Integral University, students must pass Class 12 with 45% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry & Maths/ Biology from a recognised board as per the minimum eligibility criteria. faqs.question: What is the BPharm fees at Integral University?

faqs.question: Is there BPharm (Lateral Entry) course available at Integral University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Integral University offers direct admission to the second year of BPharm through Lateral Entry. This course is taught through the Department of Pharmacy at the university for a duration of three-year. Those who are willing to get admission to this course must pass DPharm course with 45% marks in aggregate from a recognised Board/ University. The selection criteria for this course is the same as of the four-year BPharm course.

faqs.question: Is Integral University hard to get?
faqs.answer: No, it is not tough to get admission to Integral University. Candidates only have to fulfil the basic eligibility requirements of the respective courses. If candidates are applying via IUET, they only need to make some preparation strategies for IUET to crack the exam. Through the exam, candidates will be evaluated on their grasp of subjects studied in Class 12 and other General affairs. Here is theIUET exam patternfor students to ace the exam.

faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses offered at Integral University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, the university offers BTech in eight specialisations,  BCA,  BSc, and various other courses to students. At the postgraduate level, Integral University Lucknow offers MTech in nine specialisation,  MSc, and various other courses to students. Integral University Lucknow also provides PhD courses to students. The fee for various courses like BTech, MTech, BSc is INR 2.4 Lacs - INR 7 lakh, INR 1 Lacs - INR 7 lakh, and INR 1.2 Lacs - INR 5.2 lakh, respectively. There are various other costs involved like transportation, accomodation, and others. For them, please visit the official website of the uniersity.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Integral University?
faqs.answer: No, Integral University does not offer direct admission. The university accepts admission based entrance exams. The university accepts national entrance exams like IUET, MAT, CAT, CUET,  CUET-PG, and others.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Integral University Lucknow has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Integral University Lucknow's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Integral University Lucknow's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Integral University Lucknow climbed 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Pharmacy' category; have ascended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Integral University Lucknow climbed 5 ranks to #40 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Integral University Lucknow Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Integral University has 3 hostels for boys and 2 hostels for girls. The facilities provided in the hostels are common room equipped with indoor game facilities, playground and courts for outdoor games like badminton, volleyball, cricket, skating, lawn tennis, basketball, etc., gymnasium, 24 Hrs. wi-fi, water purifier, parking, guest rooms, reading room.
facilities: The campus is only 30 km from Lucknow airport and railway station
The seminar hall is well-equipped with audio-visual facilities and can accommodate 400 students
Two special lecture theatres are available for closer interaction between the recruiters and the students. Each lecture theatre is built like an amphitheatre and has a seating of 80 students
Air-conditioned group discussion rooms/ interview rooms/ conference rooms

library.description: Integral University has central as well as departmental library. The central library has the collection of more than 0.1 million documents comprising of books, theses, journals, dissertations and CDs/DVDs in the fields of applied sciences, bio sciences, engineering, medical sciences, education, humanities, literature and management with a seating capacity of 600 readers. The library collection includes 99255 volumes. The library also has the subscription of 300 printed and 7010 online journals with 2731 eBooks, 47000 articles, 3700 full text articles and 5875 indexed articles through online databases like Oxford university press, Cambridge university press. The library is fully automated by automated software KOHA.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis, Lawn Tennis

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the faculty and also with the university system.
reviews.review_text: We do not get any facilities for 1.5 lakhs, as it's the charge for 1 year of stay in the hostel. The hostel does not have AC. We don't get a single almirah or single B.Ed or anything else. It does not have a Wi-Fi system. There is no mess system included in it, and we have to give extra charges for the mess system. We don't have access to go out or in anytime we want. The room area is full of dust, or we can say the paint on the walls is very old. It has scratches. There is no single cleaner in ...

reviews.review_heading: The college gave good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of labs and classrooms are good, and the Wi-Fi network is also very good. The library is not very good, the facilities of the hostel are quite bad, and the food in the hostel is also poor. The ground is very good at our university, and many sports are played there.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing, and most of the students are satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is great, with privacy and security at their best. The food in the hostel is hygienic and tasty. They have a very dynamic schedule for dinner, lunch, and breakfast, and they also provide snacks every evening around 5 pm. The rooms are well cleaned and have good bed quality. They also provide medical facilities and a sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the university is excellent. Faculty members are good, but the placement rate is low.
reviews.review_text: My course is B.Sc. Biotechnology, and its fee is Rs. 90,000 per year. Hostel fees are separate and vary according to the type of room you choose. Mainly, two kinds of rooms are available here. They are AC and non-AC. The rooms are triple-sharing. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, microphones, and speakers.

reviews.review_heading: If you are serious about your studies, then you can study here otherwise, you cannot.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the labs, and AC is also available. Every classroom department has its library, and there is a Central library where you can study. The quality of the hostel is very good. Food is average, and the mess is there. All medical facilities, sports, and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are very helpful and help with students' careers.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the course are great, including internet connection, different kinds of labs, smart classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities is good in the hostel, the mess, and the canteen. Medical facilities have improved, and games are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Now the teachers are very good, and they help in students' career building.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were good. We had strong Wi-Fi connection and different kinds of labs, digital classroom, and library. The quality of facilities in hostel was hygienic, and provided 3 times meals. All meds were available in the medical room. There was a small playground in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Earlier faculty never focused on students that's why students can't get good placed.
reviews.review_text: The best quality of infrastructure available like good internet Wi-Fi speed, smart classroom, and different kinds of library were there. Facilities available in hostel were fully air-conditioned bedroom and good quality food. Medical facilities were good enough, and mini field was there for playing games.

reviews.review_heading: Now the faculty is old-fashioned.
reviews.review_text:
There are more facilities like better smart classes available, a big library available for students, and different laboratories available for students. 
One of the best quality food served in the hostel, better canteen hygiene is good, air-conditioned bedrooms, a medical room available, and a big ground for the students.

reviews.review_heading: A good and lovely college.
reviews.review_text: It is verified by NAAC with an A+ grade, so it has good infrastructure and a good campus view with a playground, library, auditorium, and many more facilities provided by the college. The infrastructure, as well as the nature and environment of the college, is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It's fantastic, and its infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent. It has a very big campus with a cafeteria and garden area. You can just sit in the garden and spend time with your friends. There is a library with extremely good and helpful books which we can take from there. They also have AC in the classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very nice. Teaching staff is very good and helpful and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like museum, labs, classes, smart classes, and library are well maintained and managed on 7 floors. Library has every book needed.  We get free Wi-Fi on campus. It provides best infrastructure. Some classes are AC classes, good canteen, and fresh food served.

reviews.review_heading: Integral University: A university that gives wings to your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The university has AC classrooms with A1 infrastructure, Wi-Fi available for students, smart boards and projectors in every classroom, and a library with fully furnished ACs, teachers are very supportive and provide different types of study materials like PDFs and notes; the hostel infrastructure is top class with AC in every room, elevators along with stairs featuring the latest technology in both hostel and university buildings, healthy and tasty food with proper hygiene is prepared at the can...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Although facilities are good. Infrastructure is good. Canteen and eating outlets are there. We have good transportation system and budget friendly. Good food is available at university with pocket-friendly prices. Departments are good and clean with good environment.

reviews.review_heading: This is the college of dreams and happiness.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities, like a library, canteen, practical labs, classrooms, a mess, and the best facilities for sports. The college also has dance and all other curricular activities. These activities help students in any field to build their talent.

individual_reviews.title: LTMMC - Topmost medical college of Maharashtra.

content.Placements: Nearly 90% of students got placed in my course. The highest salary is 1.5 lakh per month, and the lowest salary is Rs. 70,000 per month. We are doctors, so we are recruited to the hospital. Everyone has to do internships in our college. This college is among the top medical colleges in Maharashtra.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is present in the library. The canteen is present on the ground floor. Sports and games department is also on the ground floor. Our college takes part in various inter-college sports.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best medical college in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: LTMMC is renowned as one of the top medical colleges in Maharashtra because of its high selection ratio in the NEET PG exam and wide range of patient exposure. Sion is a well-known trauma center, and as Dharavi is near the hospital, you get the chance to see every medical condition mentioned in books.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a separate college building with a 24/7 library. There is a 5-floor OPD building and a separate award building. Hostels for college students are located near the hospital. PG students also have 2 hostels. There are 2 canteens on campus, and the RMO canteen provides good and affordable food.

faqs.answer: Lokmanya Tilak Medical College accepts the NEET PG scores, followed by the NEET PG counselling process for admission to the MD and MS courses at the PG level. As per the NEET PG cutoff 2025, the Round 2 closing ranks ranged between119and1777,of whichMD in General Medicinewas the most competitive specialisation among the students belonging to the General AI quota. hostel_campus.college_name: LTM Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: LTMMC - Topmost medical college of Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is present in the library. The canteen is present on the ground floor. Sports and games department is also on the ground floor. Our college takes part in various inter-college sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best medical college in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The college has a separate college building with a 24/7 library. There is a 5-floor OPD building and a separate award building. Hostels for college students are located near the hospital. PG students also have 2 hostels. There are 2 canteens on campus, and the RMO canteen provides good and affordable food.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned. There is an LED projector for students to grasp the topics with more clarity. There is a library which runs throughout the day. Food in the mess is quite good as compared to many other hostels I have visited.

reviews.review_heading: LTMMC Mumbai - all you need to know.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not available for first year and atleast half of the second year. Hostel room is average and it's on sharing basis. There is no mess in our hostel. A canteen is there which has limited menu options. There is no outdoor ground available in our college. Only a badminton court is available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lokmanya Tilak Municipal Medical College and General Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is not as big as other medical colleges, but the area is clean and hygienic. We have a Wi-Fi and AC-furnished library with an online educational platform for the education of students. The hostel area is also as clean as the college campus and provides 24/7 electricity and water supply.

reviews.review_heading:
SUMMARY 
Infrastructure - 4/10
Campus life - 2/10
Academics - 8/10
Exposure - 8/10
Overall - 6/10.
reviews.review_text:
LTMMC as hospital was started in 1947 and became medical college in 1964. So being a very old institute the infrastructure of this college is not at top notch level compared to other newly established colleges. Classroom - 4* 
ACs are installed in PLT
Spacious enough 
 Lighting, Projector, Screens all okay
Labs - 5* 
In 1st year all the labs are well-equipped. In anatomy dissection hall there are enough cadavers and there are 20-30 students on each cadaver. In physiology lab all the microscopes,...

reviews.review_heading: It is a prestigious college.
reviews.review_text: Our library is very good and air-conditioned. It can accommodate 1,000 students. The library provides free Wi-Fi. Our college building is very good. Our college provides two hostels, one in Sion and one in Dharavi. Our college is very old.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: All the needed facilities are provided in our college. Labs are available for every subject. Classrooms are very good and have projectors but only some classrooms have air-conditioners. Library is very huge with a capacity of 200 to 250 students. Hostels are very good. Our college has a separate canteen. Sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides accommodation facilities at very affordable prices.
reviews.review_text: Every kind of sports activity is conducted here. Debates and medical symposium are organised every year. Needless to say, these events are one of a kind and should be attended. There are many ongoing events, and one can find their hobbies and enjoy them. Until your final year, you have to share a room with 1 roommate. In 1st year, a flat is allotted to 4-6 people. Hostel rent is Rs. 4,000 per year. If one wants to take PG nearby, that'll cost 6,000-15,000 per person, depending upon your preferen...

reviews.review_heading: Ltmmc Mumbai college review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. We can say average. No playground college. In first-year hostel facility is not provided by the college. From 2nd year college provide a hostel with 4 students in a room. In the 3rd year, two students are in one room, and after providing a single room.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a place to develop skills.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is old as it is 75 year old hospital but there are always developmental tasks.  Grounds are not available because there is some construction work in progress. Hostels are renovated last year they posses family vibes.

reviews.review_heading: Best academics and faculty members with balanced facilities are provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-ventilated library, classrooms, and labs in our college. All are air-conditioned. Some department labs and classrooms are under renovation for providing better facilities for future recruited students. A new hostel building is under construction. An old UG building is available which is recently repaired and well renovated with all necessary amenities gym, canteen, etc. UG hostel canteen, college canteen, and RMO are there for the food. You can contact dabbawalas for daily tiffin...

reviews.review_heading: It provides good teachers, infrastructure, and good clinical orientation.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi, laboratories, and classrooms are available. There is a library for both UG and PG students. Hostels have libraries and canteens are also provided. There are badminton, table tennis, carrom, and the ground is provided for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to take admission in it, if students have to become successful doctors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure structure of this college is very good. A library facility is available. Two canteens are there, and the campus is not big. The sports ground is not provided. If students better in sports do not take this college otherwise academics is one of the best. For the first year, there is no hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: The life in this medical college is best.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel facilities. The library here is one of the best in Mumbai, and the classrooms are also equipped with all the modern technology. The college also consists of modern laboratories for each department. Sports and other hobbies are also given a chance to nurture.

college_info.intro:
LNCT University popular programmes are MBBS, BSc, and BTech. MBBS is offered for a duration of 4.5 year. The university also offers internship to the UG/PG and various other course students. During the internship period, students are given practical training to become successful health practitioners. After the successful completion of the MBBS programme, students could either pursue higher education such as MD, MS, etc. or can start their practice.
LNCTU also offers a BTech course. The university offers BTech specialisation in various fields such as Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, Information & Technology, etc. LNCTU Bhopal students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BTech students can work as Web Developers, Data Science Engineers, Automotive Developers, Mechanical Engineers, and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by LNCT Bhopal University and their respective LNCT Bhopal B Sc Nursing fees and various other course fee:
