overview_faqs.question: What is the MBA course fee at LNCT University?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees of the MBA course at LNCT University is INR 2.10 to 2.52 lakhs.

overview_faqs.question: What would be my ROI after MBA at LNCT University?
overview_faqs.answer: The University has not released the 2023 placement data. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. As per the report, 167 UG and 65 PG students were placed during 2022 placements. The median package offered to UG (4-year) and UG (5-year) students during LNCT Bhopal placements 2022 was INR 50,000 per annum and INR 8 LPA, respectively. For PG (2-year) and PG (3-year) courses, the median package stood at INR 3 LPA and INR 12.50 LPA, respectively.

review_summary.college_name: LNCT University Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In our college, the faculty is helpful, and placements are average at their best.

content.Placements: Around 40-50% of students were placed from the last batch. The highest package is usually 10-12 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Housiey, and Hike Education. 10% of students got internships. The top roles offered are business analyst and business developer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the labs, though some of the systems in the labs don't work. The washrooms are cleaned regularly. The canteen is good, with various options, and is very affordable.
content.Faculty: Most of the teachers are indeed helpful. For the specialization part (BIA), our college is partnered with TNL, and the trainers are skilled and helpful. The teaching quality still has a long way to go. The curriculum is good, but its execution needs improvement. If you study, you can pass without much struggle. The pass percentage is 95%.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is worth getting into this college.

content.Placements: LNCT University is one of the best colleges in Bhopal in terms of everything. Placements are top-notch. 70-80% of students get jobs with an average package that ranges from 3-4 LPA. The highest package offered ranges from 9-10 LPA. Mass recruiting companies regularly visit, like TCS, Infosys, HCL, Capgemini, and Hexaware. It also offers internships.
content.Infrastructure: Since college is old, the infrastructure is not good-looking, but it's not a big concern for students. Classrooms have a smart board, and labs have advanced devices. The library has a collection of various types of books. It has a Wi-Fi campus with good speed. Hostel facilities are acceptable. It really maintains the taste and hygiene of meals. In the canteen, a variety of meals are available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for the MBBS course.

content.Placements: There are 250 seats for MBBS in our college. We will definitely become good doctors and this college taught us to be. It is one of the top the most private medical colleges in Bhopal that we can trust. Our rank will decide whether we can get admission to this college or not.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good. Lecture theatres are awesome with air-conditioning. All labs which are required by students are present on campus. Every facility is provided which is indeed required so go for it if you are getting this college in counseling.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied with the faculty members.

content.Placements: LN Medical College and Research Centre Bhopal has its hospital named JK Hospital, which has a good patient flow and students get internships there.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is okay. The mess food is average. Overall, facilities in the hostel are good. The infrastructure is also good. The college has different departments and each department has its own labs so students can understand more topics through practicals. The campus has many colleges in the university. The college has its own sports grounds for extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best university I have ever seen.

content.Placements: Provides a decent LPA package per annum for jobs, and students are happy about it because they are worried about placements. The college offers a very good amount of jobs, and the top role offered to me is senior clerk, which is nice.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is good and well-managed. The quality of the food in the mess is excellent, and the taste is also good, I like it. The canteen also serves many varieties of food. Medical facilities are quick, and all emergency needs are available.

admission_overview.college_name: LNCT University Bhopal Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_overview.title: LNCT University Bhopal Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: LNCT University Bhopal admission is mainly based on entrance test scores. The university has over fourteen faculties through which UG, PG, Diploma, and PhD programmes are offered. These courses are offered in the fields of Architecture, Commerce, Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, Humanities and Social Sciences. At LNCT University, students can apply for the in-house LNCT CET. National-level entrance tests, such as JEE Mains/ NEET/ CAT/ GATE are also accepted for BTech, Medical, MBA, and MTech programmes respectively.

eligibility_selection.title: LNCT University Bhopal Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026

Students have to meet the preset admission criteria to get admission in the college. To be finally admitted, the students will pass through the national level gates and later undergo the institute level selection rounds. The LNCT University admission 2026-27 is open to an admissible score in national level entrance tests. Students must also clear the minimum eligibility requirements. faqs.question: Who is eligible for LNCT University Bhopal admission?

faqs.answer: LNCT University conducts LNCT CET for UG admissions. The university also considers national-level entrance tests for UG & PG admissions. The accepted tests are - JEE/ NATA/ NEET/ CAT/ GMAT/ GATE.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by LNCT University?

faqs.answer: Yes, students can get admission in LNCT University Bhopal without LNCT CET. The university conducts the exam for UG admissions. However, those with scores in other exams are also eligible. Students can submit JEE/ NATA/ CAT/ GATE/ NEET scores too.

faqs.question: Is LNCT University hard to get?
faqs.answer: Yes, LNCT University hard to get. The university accepts admission based on merit and entrance exams. The university accepts national entrance exams such as JEE Main, NEET, GMAT, NATA, and others. LNCT Bhoapl offers applications through online mode. Interested students must fill out the online application for the respective courses on the official website of LNCT University Bhopal.

faqs.question: Is studying at LNCT University expensive?
faqs.answer: Yes, LNCT University is certainly on the expensive end of the spectrum. The university provides a wide range of courses through its various affiliated colleges. Some of the courses are relatively inexpensive compared to other courses. However, the fee does go as high asINR 58.4 lakh. Students are required to pay certain components of the total fee at the time of admission. Students can visit the official website of the university for further fee related queries.

faqs.question: What is the admission requirement for LNCT University courses?

faqs.question: Is Class 12 marks enough for LNCT University admission?
faqs.answer: LNCT University admissions are done on both merit and entrance basis. Students looking to apply for the UG courses offered at the university must have passed Class 12 in the relevant field from a recognised board.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to LNCT University?
faqs.answer: No, LNCT University does not accept direct admissions for any of its courses. Students seeking to apply for the programmes offered at the university are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria of the university before filling out the application form. Admissions to a majority of the courses is through candidate's performance in the qualifying exam. For a few courses, the university also considers a valid score in national-level entrance exams, such as NATA, NEET, JEE Main, etc. In case of an admission related query, aspirants can contact the admission help desk of the university via email or phone.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Language Lab, Medical Lab, Pathology Lab, Physiotherapy Lab, Cath Lab

other_facilities: PNB and UCO Bank/ ATM facility

reviews.review_heading: In our college, the faculty is helpful, and placements are average at their best.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the labs, though some of the systems in the labs don't work. The washrooms are cleaned regularly. The canteen is good, with various options, and is very affordable.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth getting into this college.
reviews.review_text: Since college is old, the infrastructure is not good-looking, but it's not a big concern for students. Classrooms have a smart board, and labs have advanced devices. The library has a collection of various types of books. It has a Wi-Fi campus with good speed. Hostel facilities are acceptable. It really maintains the taste and hygiene of meals. In the canteen, a variety of meals are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the MBBS course.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good. Lecture theatres are awesome with air-conditioning. All labs which are required by students are present on campus. Every facility is provided which is indeed required so go for it if you are getting this college in counseling.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The campus is okay. The mess food is average. Overall, facilities in the hostel are good. The infrastructure is also good. The college has different departments and each department has its own labs so students can understand more topics through practicals. The campus has many colleges in the university. The college has its own sports grounds for extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Best university I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good and well-managed. The quality of the food in the mess is excellent, and the taste is also good, I like it. The canteen also serves many varieties of food. Medical facilities are quick, and all emergency needs are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus placements and the money they charge for the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and departments for all courses are pretty good enough and the conditions of labs, Wi-Fi, and libraries are good. The hostel facilities are good and the mess food is acceptable with good medical facilities and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A place that we all desire of, we get it, if we want so.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. There is Wi-Fi, large classrooms, a library, a computer room, and the main facility for all of us is the Moot Court. The law department has its own separate building, like all other departments. Interaction between teachers and students is also great.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very best college in the Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, which we need support. There is a big kitchen for practical and computer lab for front office. Practical, housekeeping, and restaurant services are available for practical. Hostel is very neat and clean. Very good food is available here. There is very good facility for study.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LNCT University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at LNCT University are great with smart classrooms equipped with projectors, modern labs and central library. The hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The mess food is average but the canteen offers a variety of options. Medical aid is available 24/7 and there are good sports grounds along with indoor games and many sports events.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, everything is good, but campus life sometimes feels like school rather than college.
reviews.review_text: labs are well-facilitated, Wi-Fi connections are good, and classrooms are okay. The library has lots of magazines and books. I don't live in the hostel, so I don't know much about it, but according to my friends, the college hostel rooms are spacious, and the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and learning.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good and with a lush green campus. LNCTU has a modern infrastructure with well-equipped labs, libraries, smart classrooms, hostels, sports facilities, and auditoriums. Some buildings do not have a modern infrastructure like the MCA department.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for study.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well arranged. Wi-Fi is also available. Labs are very good. Library are present with facilities of AC. Hostel has excellent infrastructure. Hostel has the facility of AC and non-AC. Many types of games are played like cricket and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placement opportunities, with around 70% of students placed.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-maintained campus with good infrastructure. It offers Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a spacious library. The hostel has decent food, and the cafeteria provides a variety of options. Sports facilities include a gym and a playground. There are basic medical facilities on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Come and have the best experience with the best faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the college. The infrastructure of the college is very good. Our college provides a gym, cafeteria library Wi-Fi. Smart classrooms and many more things. All medical facilities are provided by the college. The canteen and mess are good. Sports facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the classrooms, library, and labs is above decent, as the fees are competitive, neither too high nor too low. Wi-Fi is available in library. Facilities of hostel are decent as the food is above average but rooms are good. Canteen is open till 6:00 PM and prices are above average. Medical Facilities are available Every year college Olympics are organized.

review_content.Placements: Apart from the generalised lack of jobs after MBBS in the state, the placement ratio is one of the best there is, various PG allotments within the state and in top hospitals around the country as well. Overall not a college to be overlooked in terms of higher studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is a great positive, open air and good infrastructure, with separate speciality blocks, a super speciality hospital and psychiatry and obstetric blocks on the verge of begin completed. There is a fully functional library, Wi-Fi service all over the campus, badminton courts, basketball courts, football ground, volleyball, etc. There are sufficient hostels so as to accomodate everyone in single rooms, and the condition is alright as well.

review_content.Placements: The batch has a strength of 200. The students had to pass the first year, the second year, the third year, and the fourth year, after which they got into an internship of one year's duration. During their internship, students receive a monthly salary of INR 25,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is large and beautiful. The campus has its own sports complex, swimming pool, outdoor stadium, and gym for both boys and girls. The library has three storage buildings. Every year, five crores of money are invested in library maintenance and good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely fantastic college for education with nice infrastructure & good patient flow in hospital.

content.Placements: Many students pass with very good marks. The passing percentage is almost 100%. Many Alumni are working in the US, and BLDE graduates can seen in various fields. They are very helpful. Research is also highly supported by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college and hospital infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available everywhere and free for students. New classrooms have projectors, good lighting, and AC. The library also has AC, Wi-Fi, and ample space. Greenery is everywhere on campus. It is secured by CCTV cameras.

content.Placements: About all of students can get the placement if you apply for it, actually it's very easy,the highest package that can be offered is about 1 lakh to 1.5 lakh and minimum package can be arround 30 thousand, you can also get a job in the rural areas. So good luck!

individual_reviews.title: College is quite good and infrastructure is also good.

content.Placements: All the students who passed the 4th year of MBBS got internships, there they used to get around INR 25k monthly, and every 3 years it used to get increased. Some students used to go to government jobs, some used to go to the research field, but I had not seen any unemployed person after MBBS, they may have prepared for NEET-PG but had not been unemployed.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good, and the college campus is very big. The campus has a lot of green plants and trees. The library has a lot of sitting space and full AC. On campus, there is also a sports complex and a swimming pool. The gym is there for student workouts.

admission_process.title: BLDE University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: BLDE University admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG, Advanced Masters, Certificate and Doctorate levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences, Science and Beauty and Fitness.BLDE Universityadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET PG, and KCET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 3,000 - 1,08,15,000for UG, PG, Advanced Masters, Certificate and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 66 months - 2 years.

cut_off.college_name: BLDE University Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: BLDE University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

BLDE University NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 145003 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
BLDE University MBBS cutoff 2025 was 145003 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

BLDE University accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

BLDE University NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 62573 to 165740. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the BLDE University MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Obstetrics and Gynecology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 62573.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

BLDE University NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to M.Ch., DM courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.
In the first round, BLDE University M.Ch. cutoff 2024 was 3470 for students in the General AI category. M.Ch. in Urology was the toughest to get into.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 3212 for M.Ch. in Urology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 4350.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.
Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for BLDE University. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

highlights.description: BLDE University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #151-200 in the University category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around BLDE University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 10th Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Karnataka In 2025

nirf.description:
BLDE University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, BLDE University fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the BLDE University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

outlook.description:
BLDE University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Deemed To Be University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, BLDE University climbed 1 rank to #10 rank in the 'Deemed To Be University' category by the Outlook ranking.
The institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Medical Universities (Private)' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, BLDE University fell 6 ranks to #10 rank in the 'Medical Universities (Private)' category by the Outlook ranking.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, and the college campus is very big. The campus has a lot of green plants and trees. The library has a lot of sitting space and full AC. On campus, there is also a sports complex and a swimming pool. The gym is there for student workouts.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good here. We have an indoor stadium with basketball and tennis courts, and it also includes a gym. The hostel is fine as it is not in that good of condition. The mess food is also fine. Classrooms are good. The Wi-Fi is strong. Labs are one of the best.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend coming and being part of the BLDE family.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-equipped library, an ATM, hostels, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, one canteen, a garden, and temples. More bench installations need to be done. They are building new and well-furnished hostels, but stationary shops and malls are just outside the campus. Parking is available inside the campus.

review_content.General: 1) 100% of students were admitted into the MBBS course (UG). All the 150 seats allotted were filled based on All India entrance examination NEET UG). 2) All the students passed out successfully were given Registration number according to the MGR medical university. The Students can start their own private practice or can pursue PG course after successfully clearing NEET PG Entrance examination. Students can also get into Government jobs by clearing MRB examination. Thus they can join PHCs and provide service to the community as they aspired to be. In our college 50% of the students are studying PG. The remaining are preparing for the PG or MRB exam and few have entered into government jobs or started being a Private Practitioner. 3) Top colleges require higher marks and involve national level competition to enter into it. But ultimately a Doctor's skill and experience, the way he handles his patients and his expertise determines his Career and fame. 4) After passing out final year all the students are required to undergo a Compulsory Rotatory Resident Internship (CRRI) of 1 year in the same college or if they wish to change, any college of their preference if the MGR university board approves. PG internship is done in their respective colleges chosen by students to continue PG. 5) There are non clinical seats in our college. And our college is seeking approval for clinical and paraclinical seats too. They are self financing seats and students can pursue if they get high marks. After completing UG course students can work here as tutors and Junior Residents. Only after PG completion they get promoted to Senior Residents, assistant and associate Professor.

admission_process.title: Trichy SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Centre Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Trichy SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Centre admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The college offers admission based on NEET and NEET PG for MBBS and MD/ MS programmes, respectively. Admission to BSc is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.Trichy SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Centreoffers courses at UG and PG levels in the Medical Science field. Interested candidates can apply for the accepted entrance exam as required by the course.

The college offers courses such as MBBS, MD, MS and BSc at UG and PG levels. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. Below areTrichy SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Centre coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The college offers seats to candidates based on their entrance exam or qualifying exam scores. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. Below is course-wiseTrichy SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Centre feeand intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Admission at SRM Medical College opens with NEET registration. Aspirants fulfilling both the eligibility and selection requirements are eligible to get a seat in the college. Below are the steps to get admission in Trichy SRM Medical College Hospital and Research:
Step 1:Trichy SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Application Process 2025
Candidates need to apply for NEET-UG and NEET-PG for MBBS and MD/ MS courses. For BSc, aspirants can apply online on the official website of the college.
Step 2: Selection

The college selects candidates for MBBS based on NEET-UG score. Applicants with scores equal or above the NEET-PG cutoff are considered for admission in MD/ MS courses. The selection to BSc programme is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Aspirants with a valid NEET score need to participate in Tamil Nadu NEET Counselling. MD or MS applicants are allotted seat via NEET-PG counselling. For other programmes, aspirants need to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: How much does MBBS at Trichy SRM Medical College cost?
faqs.answer: Fees for MBBS at Trichy SRM Medical College is INR 1 crore for the entire course. Admission in MBBS can be done through National Level Entrance Examination - NEET UG. To know more regarding admission in MBBS from Trichy SRM Medical College, refer to the official website of the college.

faqs.question: How much does BSc at Trichy SRM Medical College cost?
faqs.answer: Trichy SRM Medical College offers B.Sc in various branches like : 1.B.Sc Operation Theatre & Anaesthesia Technology 2. B.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology 3. B.Sc Radiology & Imaging Technology 4. B.Sc Cardio Pulmonary Perfusion Technology 5. B.Sc Physician Assistant 6. B.Sc Dialysis Technology 7. B.Sc Critical Care Technology The fees ranges from INR 50,000 to INR 1,25,000 for the entire course, depending upon the respective branch. To know more regarding the admission process in B.Sc from Trichy SRM Medical College, Students can refer to the official website.

faqs.question: Do students get their ROI after completing MBBS from Trichy SRM Medical College?
faqs.answer: Many students pursue their MBBS Course from Trichy SRM Medical College. After completion of the course, an average of INR 6 Lacs per annum was paid to the students as salary during their placement, which will most likely increase after the student decides to open his or her own private clinic. So it's wise to say that students get their ROI after pursuing MBBS from Trichy SRM Medical College.

faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at Trichy SRM Medical College expensive?
faqs.answer: UG Courses Like MBBS at Trichy SRM Medical College cost around INR 1 Crore for the entire course, which is similar to other private medical colleges but is better in terms of studies and placements. So, UG courses at Trichy SRM Medical College are not expensive as compared to other private medical colleges. To know more regarding the fees and admission process of Trichy SRM Medical College, refer to the official website of the college.

faqs.answer:
A:    D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur has been rated 3.3 on placements on the basis of 8 reviews done by students.
In D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur, 150 students were admitted in year 2014-15, out of which 100 graduated in 2018-19. faqs.question: Does D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur provide good placement facilities?

faqs.answer: A:    As it is an MBBS college it does not provide you with placement opportunities like engineering colleges. It provides you with a 1 year stipend based internship in their own hospital after that if they find you perfect, they can hire you. The average package offered to these college students is around 8 LPA. (approx.) The highest packages goes upto 10-12 lakh per annum.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur?

faqs.answer: A:    You will be quite disappointed to hear that it is an MBBS college so it has no placements. The college will provide you with an internship opportunity in their own hospital, which is a stipend based internship. If they find you perfect, they will recruit you. The institute has a training and placement cell which provides you training for cracking higher exams like GRE, TOEFL, IELTS. Also connect with the alumini network to get knowledge from them about cracking exams.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur?

faqs.answer: A:    During 2022 placements,  41 out of 42 PG (3-year) students were placed. Earlier,  30 PG (3-year) and 130 MBBS students were placed in the 2021 drive. reviews_list.review_title: Poor campus life but good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: We don't get placements here because it is a medical college. But getting a job after getting the MBBS degree isn't a very difficult task. And not many apply for job after completing MBBS rather most of the students study higher courses like MD or UPSC etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus life is poor, because there is no proper campus, dorm parties are not allowed. Even if you throw dorm party outside the campus, and the college gets to know about it, you are in huge trouble. There are no clubs or cultural societies. Students are prom all parts of India. Hostel Facilities are only for first year students. Hostels are okay, eat sleep and go to college, nothing much can be expected.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of DY Patil Medical College, Kolhapur.

review_content.Placements: I'm a second-year MBBS student at DY Patil Medical College Kolhapur. In our college, there are three courses MBBS, physiotherapy, and nursing. The internship students, mainly MBBS students, don't get stipends as per the fees the college is not so worthy, but if you have less marks in NEET, you can apply here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are good. The campus is small. The hospital is 4 km away. Girls have one dormitory and boys have two separate hostels. The hostel buildings are old. The hostel is 2-3 km from the college. Buses are provided. The mess provides only lunch and dinner and not breakfast and snacks. In sports facilities, only cricket is played.

individual_reviews.title: College exemplifies excellence in various dimensions.

content.Placements: My batch is the batch of 2022. Every batch consists of 150 students. There are many roles that can be offered after completion of the MBBS degree. A student can pursue a postgraduate course or work as a medical officer, tutor at medical institutions, and there are other healthcare opportunities as well.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers all the necessary amenities. There are spacious classrooms and laboratories. There are 2 hostels for boys and one hostel for girls. The girls' hostel provides twin-sharing rooms. The in-time for hostels is around 9:30 to 10 pm. Cleanliness is maintained in both the college and the hostel.

content.Faculty: Faculty members are good. They solve students' problems. They are always ready to help students. They conduct semester exams very strictly and are very punctual about exams. The passing rate in internal exams is low.

admission_process.title: D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur admission is currently open for all UG and PG courses. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to complete the criteria set by the college.D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapuroffers MBBS programme at UG level and offers MD and MS programmes at PG level. Admission to all these courses is entrance-based.

Candidates seeking admission to any of the programmes must visit the official website of their respective entrance exam to apply for admission. Want to know more about D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur admission, inclusive of course-wise eligibility, selection, fees, seat intake, and admission process 2025:

D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur admission is entrance-based for all UG and PG courses. The college accepts NEET-UG and NEET-PG scores, followed by counselling for admission to UG and PG courses, respectively. Find below theD.Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur Admission Highlights
Mode of Study
Full-Time/Regular
Programmes Offered
Admission Status 2025
How to Apply?
UG:neet.ntaonline.in
PG:nbe.edu.in
Level of Programmes Offered

D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur admission is based on the performance of candidates and the rank obtained by them in the entrance exam and counselling. The college provides one course, i.e., MBBS at the undergraduate level, and two courses, i.e., MD and MS at the postgraduate level. Minimum eligibility for UG programme is Class 12 and Bachelor’s degree for PG programmes.

The college accepts the scores and ranks of NEET UG and NEET PG for admission to the specific programmes. Further, the final seat allotment is based on the performance in the counselling round. Given below is the list ofD. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English individually with minimum 45% marks in PCB from a recognised board (5% marks relaxation for reserved categories)
NEET-UG+ Counselling
MBBS degree from a recognised institute/university
NEET-PG+ Counselling
MBBS degree from a recognised institute/university
NEET-PG + Counselling
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapurfeeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee and average package for top D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur courses:

D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur seat intakevaries course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the seat intake for topD. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur admission 2025 is completely entrance-based for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The college admissions process is a multi-step process. Candidates looking for admission to any of the programmes must register on the official websites ofNEET-UGandNEET-PGfor admission. Given below is theD. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapuradmission process 2025:
Step 1:Application Process 2025
Candidates seeking D.Y. Patil Medical College course admission must apply on the official website of the respective entrance exam. The application process is conducted in online mode.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

D.Y. Patil Medical College admission 2025 is strictly based on the score obtained in the entrance exams. For MBBS, MD and MS admission is based on scores of NEET UG and NEET PG, respectively. Every candidate must qualify for these entrance exams for their desired course. Later on, the shortlisted candidates will be allocated seats through a counselling process.
Step 3: Counselling Process

All the NEET qualifiers are required to register forNEET-UG counsellingandNEET-PG counsellingprocess conducted by the MCC on the official website of the conducting body and pay the registration fee and a refundable security deposit. During the choice filling for Round 1, candidates select D.Y. Patil Medical College and choose their desired course with specialisation. Further, round-wiseNEET-UG cutoffandNEET-PG cutoffwill be released on the official website of MCC. Candidates who manage to secure a seat in Round 1 can proceed with the process, whereas the remaining candidates have to appear for other counselling rounds such as Round 2, Mop-up Round, and Stray Vacancy Round.
Step 4: Physical Reporting & Document Verification

Candidates who are allocated seats are required to download their allotment letter and report at D.Y. Patil Medical College in person for the document verification process andD.Y. Patil Medical College feepayment to lock their seats within the stipulated timeline.
Check out more on D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur in the below video:

hostel_campus.college_name: DY Patil Kolhapur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: College exemplifies excellence in various dimensions.
reviews.review_text: The college offers all the necessary amenities. There are spacious classrooms and laboratories. There are 2 hostels for boys and one hostel for girls. The girls' hostel provides twin-sharing rooms. The in-time for hostels is around 9:30 to 10 pm. Cleanliness is maintained in both the college and the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D. Y. Patil Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hospital is not good. There are very old buildings. It provides three separate hostels for boys and girls which are very far from our college.

reviews.review_heading: Poor campus life but good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The campus life is poor, because there is no proper campus, dorm parties are not allowed. Even if you throw dorm party outside the campus, and the college gets to know about it, you are in huge trouble. There are no clubs or cultural societies. Students are prom all parts of India. Hostel Facilities are only for first year students. Hostels are okay, eat sleep and go to college, nothing much can be expected.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DY Patil Medical College, Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are good. The campus is small. The hospital is 4 km away. Girls have one dormitory and boys have two separate hostels. The hostel buildings are old. The hostel is 2-3 km from the college. Buses are provided. The mess provides only lunch and dinner and not breakfast and snacks. In sports facilities, only cricket is played.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teaching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel buildings are old. There are two separate hostels for boys named Fernandes, and for girls, Ajinkya Tara. Hostels are not situated on the college campus, they are about 3-4 km away. The mess serves food only for lunch and dinner. They don't provide snacks. The food is average. Students should not enter the hostel after 9 PM.

reviews.review_heading: D. Y. Patil Medical College in brief.
reviews.review_text: The college is well equipped with modern projectors and interactive screen, well designed labs and transportation with facilities like Wi-Fi, library, canteen etc. There are routinely seminars and guestlectyres along with sports facilites like badminton, football etc.

reviews.review_heading: A great faculty with very poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have all the infrastructure needed for academic purposes from anatomy labs to pathology labs. We have extra 64 cadavers stored for future batches also. The only backdrop is that there is no infrastructure at all for sports. The hostel is only for the first year students. The food in the hostel is not bad, but okay.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D. Y. Patil Medical College, Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The hostel needs maintenance, but the college has very good infrastructure and an excellent Wi-Fi system. The courses are up-to-date and feature a strong curriculum that helps us understand the material quickly. It provides great value for money and is the best choice.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but there are no stipends for internships.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is small but it is decent. There are no cases of ragging in our college, and the seniors are very helpful. Hostel rooms are good and it is shared based. The food served in the canteen is good. Many students change the mess according to their taste.

reviews.review_heading: The college and hospital have good teachers and faculty
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good however the main infrastructure depends on the hospital as the students start visiting the hospital from second year, the hospital infrastructure is also very good the department of medicine and surgery are well developed as they are the most important departments of the hospital.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I have a very good study experience and fun altogether.

review_content.Placements: I was admitted through NEET UG in 2016. About 95 students, apart from 101 from our batch, got into direct internships.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 19th batch of Jubilee Mission Medical College. We will get placed after we pass out. About 90% of students secured internships from our college. College offers postgraduate courses. There is a superspecialty department in our hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many departments in the college including medicine surgery, OBG, and gynecology. There are clinical and non-clinical departments in our college. There are good facilities in hostel. The quality of food available is average. There is a college ground near the college for extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I am studying at Jubilee Mission Medical College, Thrissur. I belong to the 19th batch. Medical colleges typically have a different approach to placement compared to other academic disciplines. Graduates from the medical college undergo a residency program rather than traditional job placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have an occupancy of 100 people, and Wi-Fi is available in the college. There are library facilities in the college, along with hostel facilities for both men and women. Three people share one room. The quality of the food is average, and there is a ground for sports activities.

review_content.Placements: 50 per cent of students get placed. The highest package is 46 LPA. TCS and Amazon are top recruiting companies. 50 per cent get an internship. Overall, it's just an average college for placements compared to others, not the best for placements, but ok, just ok, ok college and low packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: One of the best infrastructures in Chennai. Best labs also, and the buildings are just amazing, more than enough computer labs and placement training cells. There is no compromise in infrastructure, but the drawback is it's far from the city, that's all I can say.

reviews_list.review_title: The best part in my life is Saveetha because they made me a proper man.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 90% of the students are getting placed every year. The salary packages start with an average of 4 LPA. Nearly 50% of the students have received internships from companies like Zudio, etc., but the college does not provide the internships we want to search for. The roles offered in the course are like web developer and data analytics roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is good because I stayed there for 2 years. The hostel is well-clean and neat. The classrooms have AC, and the whole campus has Wi-Fi facility. The food available at the time canteen is good because we have a hospital on our campus. There are so many sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and curriculum.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed last year. The top I know is 48 LPA and last year the highest package offered is 36LPA. They offer many internships and allow us to gain knowledge. They are using flexi learn which allows you to study which course you want to study and which staff member you want to teach you.
content.Infrastructure: There are many lab facilities. All subject labs are available and we are allowed do everything practically. They even allow you to get everything more practically and at the same time you can study theoretically too soo that you can score academically.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good, but it is very important to improve further.

content.Placements: 50% of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 35 LPA, and the least is 4 LPA. Wipro, TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, etc., recruit. We are still trying to get into an internship in my department, but it is very tough to get an internship with a stipend for a duration of 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: Good, we have all the facilities which help us to be comfortable and gain some knowledge in my studies. Hostel facilities are not that good, but we can manage and adjust to be in a comfort zone, and food is provided by canteens, not by the college, which costs differently for different canteens.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SIMATS, Saveetha University review.

content.Placements: 50 per cent of students get placed. The highest package is 46 LPA. TCS and Amazon are top recruiting companies. 50 per cent get an internship. Overall, it's just an average college for placements compared to others, not the best for placements, but ok, just ok, ok college and low packages.
content.Infrastructure: One of the best infrastructures in Chennai. Best labs also, and the buildings are just amazing, more than enough computer labs and placement training cells. There is no compromise in infrastructure, but the drawback is it's far from the city, that's all I can say.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A step to grow my career in life is based on the quality of education, faculty, and environment.

content.Placements: The college placement is better compared to the previous year because more companies are coming to our college. The average packages start from 3 to 4 LPA, with roles offered primarily in design. The top recruiting companies are CTS, Cognizant, and Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in our college is very good. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The library is big and good. The canteen food is good and tasty. There is a medical facility on campus as well. The college gives more importance to games and sports. Overall, hostels are also good.

admission_overview.college_name: Saveetha University Admission 2025: Cutoffs, Eligibility, Application, Fee & Dates

admission_process.title: Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Saveetha University (SU),Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciencesoffers UG, PG and doctorate level in the field of Engineering, Architecture, Law, Nursing, Medical and Management. Admission to these programmes is either based on entrance exam scores or merit.

Saveetha University, Chennai offers 10 UG and PG programmes in 11 academic departments covering diverse fields of education such as Engineering, Architecture,Management, Law, Medical, Nursing, Dental, Optometry, Physiotherapy, Allied Health Sciences and Pharmacy. A student-to-faculty ratio of 6:1 is maintained by the University, helping students to cultivate closer relationships with lecturers and having quicker access to feedback. SIMATS admission is purely provisional and is always subject to confirmation from Anna University / Directorate of Technical Education, Chennai. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toSaveertha University Courses:

Saveetha University admission process includes registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat at Saveetha University:STEP 1:Saveetha UniversityApplication Process 2025Candidates must download the application form from the official website of Saveetha University. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1000 to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.STEP 2: SelectionSaveetha University shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exams such as TNEA, GATE, CLAT, SLAT and SUCET. The college evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.STEP 3:Admission ConfirmationOnce selected, candidates need to pay acourse feeto confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Is TNEA enough for Saveetha University, B.Tech admissions?
faqs.answer: For MBA and ME/MTech programs in Saveetha Engineering College, admissions are offered based on TANCET and CEETA PG entrance examinations. description: Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences cutoff 2024 for NEET SS is available on this page for admission to super speciality courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences NEET SS cutoff 2024 for different courses, specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
Saveetha Medical College, Thandalam Campus NEET UG cutoff 2025 is out, wherein the closing rank was 432358 for MBBS admission in the General AI quota.
The NEET UG Round 1 cutoff for the same course was 568054 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff rank stood at 609404 for the General category students.

NEET UG 2025 cutoff ranks for Saveetha Medical College admission to the MBBS course have been released. paragraphs: Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences is not very Expensive,   The most expensive course at this University is MBA which costs 3.5 lacs for 1 year. And the cheapest course is Bp.ed which costs 30k per year. Looking at these figures it can be said that this University is not very expensive. Mostly colleges charge more than 3.5 lacs for MBA on an average basis. If you are willing to take admission at this University you should not only consider the fees factor but you should consider other factors too like placements, infrastructure, faculty etc.

The Institute offers four year full time BPharma degree. The total tuition fee for BPharm at Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences (Saveetha University) is approximately INR 6,  00,000. The minimum eligibility criteria for admission to BSc is that students must have passed Class 12th with mandatory subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/Biology from a recognised board.

Saveetha University BPharm fee is cumulative of different components, such as caution money, hostel fee, tuition fee, and more. Some of the fee components are refundable, while some are non-refundable. The total tuition fee for the BPharm course is INR 6 lakh, which candidates are required to pay within the duration of the course i.e., four years. This fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee at GGSIPU for MBA course?
overview_faqs.answer: Total course fee is total of multiple components such as tuition fee, library fee, registration fee, security deposit etc. Indraprastha University MBA fees range between INR 1.5 lakh and 5.65 lakh. This fee range includes MBA course fees at several IPU colleges. This information is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. For more detail on fee structure, candidates are advised to contact admission department of University.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at IPU?
overview_faqs.answer: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University's annual hostel cost is INR 29,500. Mess and welfare fees are not included in the hostel fees. The fee for the mess is INR 36,000, while the cost of the welfare is INR 3,000. Candidates need to submit three demand drafts: one for hostel fees, one for mess charges, and one for welfare charges. Two hostels are maintained on campus for male students, and two are maintained for female students. There are more than 180 single-seat rooms in each hostel. Basic furnishings such as a cot, mattress, pillow, chair, table, cupboard, tube lamp, and fan are provided in each room. Mess facilities are available for residents in each hostel. Residents also have access to a common area, a gym, a reading room, and sports facilities. For the hostels, there is a provision for 24-hour water and electrical services.

overview_faqs.question: Is CAT compulsory for MBA at IPU?
overview_faqs.answer: No, CAT is not the only exam based on which admission is granted. GGSIPU accepts the CAT percentile for MBA admission basis on which a merit list of selected candidates is released for the counselling round. Moreover, for the MBA in IT course, the university conducted IPU CET exam is accepted. In case the seats are left vacant after CAT candidates, then the seat allotment is carried out based on the candidate's CMAT scores.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My journey at Delhi Metropolitan Education.

content.Placements: Our college provides placements, internships, and also externships. The college has a training and placement cell that works to help students crack internships, externships, and placements. The training and placement cell provides us with details of Tier 1, 2, and 3 firms and also advocates to do internships in the final year and try to join permanently.
content.Infrastructure: DME has good infrastructure and a clean campus. The college has 2 lifts, a canteen, a big library, a moot court hall, a seminar hall, an amphitheater, and many more facilities. The college has a lot of greenery. The college service staff are also friendly and are always available to maintain the college clean and good looking.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for law studies with helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements at D.M.E are quite good for B.A. LL.B. students. Many students get internship opportunities with reputed law firms and legal offices.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not very large, but it has all the necessary facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, and moot court halls. Classrooms are well maintained and have a clean environment for studying. Hostel facilities are provided by the college in Greater Noida with basic amenities, security, and comfortable accommodation.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of D.M.E are qualified and supportive. Every teacher is UGC NET qualified with good knowledge of law subjects and explains concepts clearly. The curriculum is relevant and includes practical exposure like moot courts and internships. Semester exams are moderately difficult, and the overall pass percentage is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Shift II) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty members with great facilities.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed by the college. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Airtel, etc. 75% of the students got internships in Wipro and various startup companies.
content.Infrastructure: CCTV, projectors, and 2 A/C are in every classroom. The classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Labs are also equipped with good-quality computers. The computers are fully functional and properly maintained. The canteen provides good and hygienic food and a variety of food.

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good environment.

The top recruiters are Wipro, Accenture, and Crisis. 75% student are given the opportunity of an internship, and a few are given the opportunity for an externship.
content.Infrastructure: Classes are provided with a projector, 2 AC, and CCTVs. Proper sitting arrangements are there, the desk and table are neat and clean. Studios are properly maintained. The library has lots of books for students from different courses. The canteen is properly maintained and hygienic.

admission_overview.college_name: GGSIPU Admission 2026: Last Date, Courses, Eligibility, Fee, Application Form

admission_overview.title: IPU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: IPU admission 2026 is based on the scores of candidates in the entrance exam. The university conducts in-house entrance test, i.e., IPU CET. This exam is accepted by the university for most of its courses. Other than this, students can also apply with CUET, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, etc. At IPU, students can find courses in different streams, such as Engineering, Arts, Management, and more. The applications can be submitted by visiting the university's website.

eligibility_selection.title: IPU Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: IPU offers admission to various courses, including BSc, BCA, BCom (Hons), B.Ed, BA (JMC), BHMCT, BBA, BA (Hons), BVoc, BPT, BPO, BOT, BASLP, BSc MLT, MSc, MA, MEd, MPT, MOT and MPO, based on Common Entrance Test (CET). The university also conducts a counselling process. For a few courses, students can also apply via CUET UG, JEE Main, CAT, CMAT, GATE and others. Check below some popular IP University courses along with their selection and eligibility criteria: Completed Class 12 with PCM and 50% marks or above

faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed their graduation with a minimum of 50%-60% aggregate are eligible to apply for MBA programme at GGSIPU. Candidates with a 50% score in graduation can also apply provided the requirement of aggregate is 50% or below. For MBA specialisations requiring 60% or above aggregate, candidates need not get admission with 50%.
faqs.question: I've scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission to MBA at GGSIPU?

faqs.answer: Admissions in GGSIPU are done on entrance-basis. The basic eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 or its equivalent exam with a minimum aggregate of 50%. Hence, you can certainly apply for the BBA course even if you have scored less than 60% in your Class 12 boards. However, BBA admissions at GGSIPU are accepted on the basis of valid score obtained in the IPU CET or CUET followed by counselling. Only those who meet the cut-off and satisfy all the parameters will be allocated a seat at GSSIPU for the BBA programme. In case the students are unable to clear the BBA cut-off released by the university, they can pursue the BBA Online courses offered by various other colleges.
faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in 12th boards. Am I eligible to get BBA at GGSIPU?

faqs.answer: Go to the official webpage of Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University.An application sequence number, user ID and password for future logins and a link to the application form to proceed with further steps is then given.In the first stage of the application form, enter personal details, such as name, parents' name, age, nationality, etc.Upload the required set of documents and pay the prescribed application fee INR 1,500 via debit card/credit card/net banking.
faqs.question: What is the application process for BCA at IP University?

faqs.answer: Your IPU CET rank of 5574 gives a good opportunity to join a number of colleges under IP University that offer BCA. Though the number of seats and hierarchy of colleges change annually, I have taken the liberty to name two IP University colleges, where BCA admission will come easy with your rank: Maharaja Surajmal institute Vivekananda Institute of Professional Studies.
faqs.question: My rank in IPU CET is 5574. Which college can I get under IP University for BCA?

admission_process.title: IPU Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: IPU admissionis based on entrance exam scores of the aspirants. The university conducts IPU CET for admission. Candidates must follow the steps given below:
1:The application process of IPU for all the affiliated institutes is done via a centralised application portal.
1.1: Visit the official website of IPU,www.ipu.ac.inand click on 'Admission'.
1.2. Read the instructions and click on 'Start'.
1.3. Select the course and enter the required details. Select CET or Non CET.
1.4. Candidates get an application sequence number, user ID and password.
1.5. Login and fill out the form.
1.6. Upload the documents and pay the application fee.
2: Report for IPU CET

The E-admit card is available on the official website of GGSIPU. Candidates must appear for the exam at the allotted centre on or before reporting time. Candidates must check the GGSIPU website for admission related queries.
3: CET Merit List & Counselling

GGSIPU merit listis prepared based on inter-se merit for candidates. Candidates are then called for a counselling round. The list of selected students is displayed on the University's Website one week before the start of counselling. The seat is allotted to candidates only when they attend counselling. Candidates needs to pay the course fee on the spot at the time of counselling for admission.
4: Document Verification
Students must report for document verification.
GGSIPU also accepts CUET scores. IPU conducts counselling round in online and offline modes. Check below the counselling process for IPU admission via CUET:
1: Register for Counselling
Candidates have to apply in online or offline mode for counselling.

Aspirants must login with the ID and password to fill out the application. The IPU counselling fee is INR 1,000. Candidates must fill out the details and take a printout of the form. The university conducts document verification in online mode based on details provided by the candidate during enrolment.
3: Choice Filling & Seat Allocation

Aspirants can download the preference sheet from the GGSIPU brochure. Candidates must visit the university's official website. It must be noted that the preference sheet is for only one counselling round. Hence, a new preference sheet must be filled for each round. The seats are allotted to the candidates based on their merit, category and region.

IPU feeinclude tuition fees, hostel fees, security deposit, library fees, etc. Aspirants have to pay a part of the fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat  in the mode specified by the university. Check belowIPU feesfor popular courses:
NOTE:The fees is taken from an official source and may change.
IPU reserves some of the seats for candidates belonging to reserved categories. The reserved categories are SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD/Defence/Army/Minority. Check below theIPU seat intakefor popular courses:
NOTE:The seat intake is taken from an official source and may change.
Check below the reservation policy at GGSIPU:
Quick Links:Top Universities in Delhi/NCR
Check below video for more information onGGSIPU admissions:
lists: For the open house counselling, the candidate must meet eligibility criteria (including all documents/mark sheets) at the time of counselling. This may differ for some courses.
On the day of admission/counselling, candidates must take a decision on the spot and no further time is given by the university.

courses_data.description: GGSIPU MBA is a two-year course offered in five specialisations. For admission toIPU MBAin IT, the university conducts IPU CET, followed by a University-level counselling process. In addition, for other specialisations, the candidate's CAT score is accepted for admission. However, if the seats remain vacant after counselling on the basis of the CAT score, then counselling is conducted on the basis of the CMAT score. In case seats remain vacant, IPU conducts a Common Entrance Test (CET) to fill up the remaining seats.

eligibility: Accepting Exams:NIMCET, CUET-PG, IPU CET, CUET
courses_data.description: GGSIPU offers two-year MCA course at the PG level. It is a full-time course.IPUoffers admission to MCA based on merit in NIMCET. If the seats are left vacant after counselling, admission to MCA and MCA (Lateral Entry) courses is granted on the basis of merit in IPU CET/CUET-PG. This PG-level course is also offered in the second shift (evening) by a few IPU-affiliated colleges. Candidates who have completed their graduation with a minimum aggregate of 55% can apply for the MCA course.

faqs.question: How to apply for MCA at IP University?
faqs.answer: For Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University MCA admission, candidates need to appear for the NIMCET entrance test. IP University MCA (lateral) entry admission is based on the IPU CET entrance test. In case of vacant seats after counselling, GGSIPU will consider Common Entrance Test (CET), conducted by GGSIP University for MCA admission. Candidates can fill out the accepted exams form through the official website of the conducting bodies.Furthermore, eligible candidates have to go to thr IPU of

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MCA at GGSIPU?
faqs.answer: Aspirants are offered admission in MCA and MCA (Software Engineering) based on NIMCET, CET or CUET scores. GGSIPU considers NIMCET scores for first level of selection. In case the seats remain vacant after admission via NIMCET counselling, the university considers CET scores. The vacant seats after exhausting the merit list of CET are filled through the merit list of CUET. The applicants, if admitted, may have to study additional bridge courses as per the norms of the university. Selected candid

faqs.question: Is MCA available at IPU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University offers a two-year full-time MCA course at the postgraduate level. The University also offers MCA (Lateral) course for a duration of one year. Admission to MCA is completely entrance-based and depends on candidates' performance in the National Institute of Technology Master of Computer Applications Common Entrance Test (NIMCET).

faqs.question: Is MCA 2 or 3 years in IPU?
faqs.answer: As per theIP University2023 brochure, the duration of all the MCA courses is two-year. The course is further divided into semester pattern. There are four semesters during the course. The syllabus might also be defined semester-wise. Candidates have to pass all the semester exams in order to get a MCA degree from IPU.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in GGSIPU?
faqs.answer: No, GGSIPU doesn't offer direct admission.  IP University does not allow any of the affiliated colleges/institutes/agencies to grant direct admission to any of the courses of the university.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

placement_report.college_name: GGSIPU Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: GGSIPU placement report for 2025 is yet to be released. However, as per the overall NIRF 2025 data, the median package offered UG-4 Year was INR 8.25 LPA . The median package offered to the UG 5-year was INR 8.39 LPA . While the median packages offered to the PG 1-Year and PG 2-Year students were INR 5.35 LPA and INR 6.95 LPA , respectively.

The University has released the placement report 2024 for GGSIPU’s University School of Information, Communication & Technology ( USICT ). The highest package offered at GGSIPU USICT was INR 41.2 LPA . The average package offered was INR 7.2 LPA . Further, 126 offers were made and 32 companies visited the campus during USICT placements 2024. Apart from this, according to USMS NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during IPU MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 6.18 LPA . In addition, a total of 160 students were placed out of 175 students during Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University MBA placements 2023.

faqs.question: What is the average placement package offered during GGSIPU MBA placements?
faqs.answer: GGSIPU MBA placement data 2024 is not released. However, according to GGSIPU Management NIRF report 2024, the median package offered over the past three years during IPU MBA placements is presented below: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) MBA INR 5.2 LPA INR 5.6 LPA INR 6.18 LPA

faqs.question: What is the average placement package offered at GGSIPU?
faqs.answer: The average package offered during IPU USICT placements 2024 stood at INR 7.2 LPA. Further, a declining trend was witnessed in the average package offered over the past three years, which is presented below: Particulars IPU USICT Placement Statistics (2022) IPU USICT Placement Statistics (2023) IPU USICT Placement Statistics (2024) Average package INR 12 LPA INR 9 LPA INR 7.2 LPA Note: Placement data 2024 is based on on-campus drives till February 2024 Earlier, the average package offered during GGSIPU USEM placements between 2016 and 2022 stood at INR 10 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the fees for BBA in IPU?
faqs.answer: The total fee of BBA at IPU includes components such as tuition fee, registration fee, security charges, etc. The tuition fee for the UG courses range between INR 96,500 and INR 4.2 lakh. This fee range is cumulative of courses offered by the university through its affiliated colleges, hence may vary. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates can visit the IP University official website (ipu.ac.in) to get more information on the fee structure or get in touch with the admission office.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at IPU?
faqs.answer: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University's annual hostel cost is INR 29,500 . Mess and welfare fees are not included in the hostel fees. The fee for the mess is INR 36,000 , while the cost of the welfare is INR 3,000 . Candidates need to submit three demand drafts: one for hostel fees, one for mess charges, and one for welfare charges. Two hostels are maintained on campus for male students, and two are maintained for female students. There are more than 180 single-seat rooms in each hostel. Basic furnishings such as a cot, mattress, pillow, chair, table, cupboard, tube lamp, and fan are provided in each room. Mess facilities are available for residents in each hostel. Residents also have access to a common area, a gym, a reading room, and sports facilities. For the hostels, there is a provision for 24-hour water and electrical services.

description: GGSIPU cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to several undergraduate and postgraduate courses based on candidates' performance in the national-level exam or through IPU CET conducted by GGSIPU. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the sections below to view the Indraprastha University cutoff across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

IPU cutoff 2025 was released via GGSIPU entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 35838 and 159799 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 35838, B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 27680.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 35838.

highlights.description:
IPU is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #93 in the University category, #76 under Management, #22 under Law, #22 under State Public University, and #36 under Architecture & Planning. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #1001-1200 to IPU. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in IPU rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, IPU has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, IPU fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, IPU fell 13 ranks to #93 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, IPU fell 12 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, IPU fell 11 ranks to #76 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less
