outlook.description:
Across the years, it is observed that IPU is consistently recognised as a highly-ranked institute in different categories by Outlook-ICARE 2024 among other institutes by excelling in key areas such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, and many more. It is to be noted that the IPU's rankings in 'MBA (Government)' category have demonstrated a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, IPU fell 1 rank to #15 rank in the 'MBA (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
IPU has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, IPU climbed 50 ranks to #951 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IPU climbed 62 ranks to #258 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IPU climbed 25 ranks to #56 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

hostel.description: There are 2 boys Hostel, shivalik and Aravalli Boys hostel and 2 Girls Hostel, Nilgiri and Satpura Girls Hostel. Each room of the hostel is equipped with all basic eminities like cot, chair table etc.
facilities: Hostels: There are 2 boys Hostels, Shivalik and Aravalli Boys hostel and 2 Girls Hostel, Nilgiri and Satpura Girls Hostel. Each room of the hostel is equipped with all basic amenities like a cot, chair table etc.

You can choose from a variety of games and sports like cricket, volleyball, football, basketball, powerlifting, body lifting, table tennis, yoga, arm wrestling, bodybuilding, badminton, lawn tennis, etc. for both men and women.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 10 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My journey at Delhi Metropolitan Education.
reviews.review_text: DME has good infrastructure and a clean campus. The college has 2 lifts, a canteen, a big library, a moot court hall, a seminar hall, an amphitheater, and many more facilities. The college has a lot of greenery. The college service staff are also friendly and are always available to maintain the college clean and good looking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college for law studies with helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not very large, but it has all the necessary facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, and moot court halls. Classrooms are well maintained and have a clean environment for studying. Hostel facilities are provided by the college in Greater Noida with basic amenities, security, and comfortable accommodation.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Great faculty members with great facilities.
reviews.review_text: CCTV, projectors, and 2 A/C are in every classroom. The classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Labs are also equipped with good-quality computers. The computers are fully functional and properly maintained. The canteen provides good and hygienic food and a variety of food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good environment.
reviews.review_text: Classes are provided with a projector, 2 AC, and CCTVs. Proper sitting arrangements are there, the desk and table are neat and clean. Studios are properly maintained. The library has lots of books for students from different courses. The canteen is properly maintained and hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, opportunity to provide, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well-maintained classrooms with the proper seating arrangement. Our college provides Wi-Fi facility too. Computer labs are still working. The canteen provides affordable meals. Though they can improve the variety of food. The college also encourages sports and games. Even the students from our college have been to the national level in sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 6 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with great opportunities for growth.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. The studio is easily one of the best in the region, and it has all the latest features and equipment. There is an AV lab and a PCR for those interested in audio editing as well. The auditorium and seminar hall provide great space for ceremonies and debates. Classrooms are AC as well. The library is well stocked, and students can easily find reference materials there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 6 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities, faculty, and a good fest and social culture.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It has nice facilities with air conditioning in every class. The library has a lot of stuff. The food available in the canteen is good and has a great variety. There are a lot of societies. The studio for media studies is one of the best in Delhi NCR. Students are also given access to chroma screens, cameras, mics, and other equipment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 3 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement, supportive faculty, and modern infrastructure with strong industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. The classrooms are air-conditioned. The college has Wi-Fi connectivity. The computer facilities are good. The library is well-stocked. The college also has a moot court hall which is very attractive and professional too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 3 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has balanced academics with good exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-maintained computer labs, a library with academic resources, a moot court hall for law students, seminar halls, and an auditorium. The college does have its own hostel, but PG accommodation is easily available nearby in Sector 62. Canteen facilities are decent. Medical facilities are provided in the college. There is a well-maintained moot court for law students. It helps students understand real court proceedings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 1 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college with best faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has a hostel but it is associated with its sister college which is DTC near Pari Chowk. So it's not a good choice to take a college hostel. The college has various departments for various courses. They also have Wi-Fi but only for teachers as the system is installed in the library and the network in the college is bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 27 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has industrial base courses.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is available on all the floors, including in labs and the library. The library has all the relevant course books needed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 27 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Immensely satisfied with the college, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are top-notch. The studio is there for broadcasting, pcr room where we can practice anchoring, shoot video, etc. It gives a real thrill. The quality is maintained throughout. We have a canteen which provides food for every occasion.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Gitarattan International Business SchoolReviewed on 3 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for management studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good we have college canteen, library, it Labs, common areas for social interactions. College library is open for us from 9 to 5:00 p. m. and there we can set and there we can sit and study. We gain practical exposure through our computer Labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Gitarattan International Business SchoolReviewed on 2 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college with good infrastructure and friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and well-maintained classrooms are available. A library with sufficient books is present. The campus atmosphere is very disciplined. The environment is very friendly. The classrooms are very spacious and the canteen food is tasty.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gitarattan International Business SchoolReviewed on 2 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall a very good experience.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is satisfactory and functional. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with basic facilities like- projectors and proper seating. The library is well stocked with course related books and online courses, which is very helpful for academics and research work. The canteen food quality is good with clean and basic amenities. Medical and sports facilities are available for the improvement.

data.description: The faculty of Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University is very knowledgeable, friendly and extremely qualified. The faculty members are PhD holders. Their teaching methodology involves a case-study approach, presentations, class participation, industrial visit, live projects, simulation, etc.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Jamia Millia Islamia ranks 13 under the 'Overall' category, 4 under the 'University' category, 20 under the 'Research Institutions' category, 24 under the 'Engineering' category, and 28 under the 'Management' category.

QS World University Rankings 2026 have been released. According to the same, Jamia Millia Islamia ranks wihtin 761-770 under the category "World Universities".

Jamia Millia Islamia admissions 2026 are open to various courses. A few more updates are as follows:

college_info.intro:
Among the different courses extended at Jamia Millia Islamia its BTech, MBA and MA courses stand out as the flagship programmes of the university and are highly sought-after among students for different reasons.
The JMI BTech is extended at the UG level while the JMI MBA is a PG level programme, both BTech and MBA at Jamia are popular for its placements and career opportunities with BTech graduates able to take on a range of Technical roles and positions. While MBA graduates are great for companies looking to fill leadership positions whether it be in Marketing, HR Management, Sales, Finance, Banking, etc.
While the JMI MA programme is more focused on academics with a wide range of specialisations given that allows students to pursue the interests of their passions with some of the topics covered including:
Interested students can check out the other Jamia University Delhi courses that are popular at the university alongside their eligibility and fees below:

Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    The Jamia Millia Islamia MBA placements for 2025 have not been released yet. However, the annual report from 2024, has the highest salary offered to MBA batch passing out in 2024 which was INR 24 LPA. While the highest package offered in 2023 was INR 24 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the salary of MBA placement in Jamia Millia Islamia?

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the overall experience, good environment, and decent infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: College provides no placement opportunities as such, but it organises several exhibitions and fests to give the students enough exposure to get placed. The package can start from Rs 20,000 per month and go upto Rs 80,000 for freshers. It depends entirely on the skill set of the students. Students can work as graphic designer, UI UX designer, illustration artist, or animator.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are well maintained and have all the basic necessities like Wi-Fi and air-conditioned libraries. The campus has decent infrastructure. The washrooms are not that great and need regular cleaning. Classrooms are well-ventilated. The food quality in the mess and the canteen is average but eatable. Medical facilities are barely provided. There is a huge sports complex at gate number 3.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Sanskrit - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Jamia Millia Islamia review

review_content.Placements: The placement in our course was not good in any college because it is an academic course, not a vocational course. The career options after this are assistant professor, teacher, or translator. Some companies like BPO/Customer Care recruit us with a salary of 3–4 LPA. Students also got internships in various institutes.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facility was available. A central library was present. Classrooms were integrated with digital TV. The quality of the hostel was extremely good, but the hostel capacity was very less, so most students could not get hostel accommodation.

overview_faqs.question: What is Jamia Millia Islamia famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: Jamia Millia Islamia is a popular and affordable public university in Delhi. Tuition fee for all the departments at JMI ranges between 5 K to 20 K per year. The hostel and mess fees are minimal, totalling 38 K for the entire year. JMI is also known for having the Faculty of Architecture & Ekistics. The university runs Radio Jamia on 90.4 FM, with a variety of programs.

overview_faqs.question: Is BTech at Jamia Millia Islamia good?
overview_faqs.answer: The answer to whether BTech from Jamia Millia Islamia is good or not depends on a lot of factors. All these factors are listed below one after another:Specialisations: BTech at Jamia is available across the five most common specialisations, namely, Civil, Computer, Electrical, Electronics & Communication and Mechanical Engineering. In a world where more in-depth specialisations, such as Data Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning are trending the university still sticks to the basic courses. For students looking out for core information on the trending areas of AI and ML, it can't be considered a good option. But in case, a student wishes to stay with the traditional branches, Jamia Millia Islamia can be a good option.Placements: Another factor that comes into consideration while choosing a college for a course is its return on investment value. The same can be calculated basis of the kind of placements offered to the students. As per the data collated from the verified

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) is avialable in Jamia Millia Islamia. Candidates need to pass Class twelve examination with mandatory subject from a recognised Board or University (50% is not compulsory).

review_summary.college_name: Jamia Millia Islamia Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is very good and the faculty is very helpful in every advice or term.

content.Placements: The placement records are on the notice board. About 80 percent of students get internships. The highest is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 7 LPA. I don’t know the top roles, but they are majorly corporate and some are semi-government. Overall, students are very happy with it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good. The Wi-Fi and the canteen food are also decent. Sports happen every month, and a lot of students participate in them. Prizes are also decent, like vouchers and electronic gadgets, which are very helpful for students and increase their productivity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Affordable and superb infrastructure college.

content.Placements: A total of 48 students got placed in 2025, and the highest is about 18.56 LPA in Optum, and the lowest is in TCS Ninja with 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Optum, HCL, Accenture, Visa, IDFC, HSBC, etc. Around 40 percent of students got their internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-class. Although the area is not that big because of the Delhi location, the overall infrastructure is the best. Jamia has its sports complex where Ranji matches are also held, and all facilities are available. Hostel charges are about Rs. 40,000 per year, including mess and accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: BFA in Applied Art - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the overall experience, good environment, and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: College provides no placement opportunities as such, but it organises several exhibitions and fests to give the students enough exposure to get placed. The package can start from Rs 20,000 per month and go upto Rs 80,000 for freshers. It depends entirely on the skill set of the students. Students can work as graphic designer, UI UX designer, illustration artist, or animator.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are well maintained and have all the basic necessities like Wi-Fi and air-conditioned libraries. The campus has decent infrastructure. The washrooms are not that great and need regular cleaning. Classrooms are well-ventilated. The food quality in the mess and the canteen is average but eatable. Medical facilities are barely provided. There is a huge sports complex at gate number 3.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Sanskrit - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Jamia Millia Islamia review

content.Placements: The placement in our course was not good in any college because it is an academic course, not a vocational course. Students also got internships in various institutes.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facility was available. A central library was present. Classrooms were integrated with digital TV. The quality of the hostel was extremely good, but the hostel capacity was very less, so most students could not get hostel accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. Hons. in French and Francophone Studies - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jamia Millia Islamia.

content.Placements: The placement in our course is not quite good, but it has a good curriculum and alumni network as compared to other colleges. The package offered in our course is around 4-5 LPA. Some translating firms hire us. Around 70 percent of students get internship offers.

faqs.question: How can I apply for Jamia Millia Islamia entrance exam?

faqs.answer:
The admission process for Bachelor of Architecture B.Arch may vary from college to college, but generally, the following steps are involved:
Eligibility: The candidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with mathematics as a compulsory subject and obtained a minimum of 50% marks (45% for reserved categories). Entrance exam: The candidate must have appeared for the National Aptitude Test in Architecture NATA or the Joint Entrance Examination JEE Main Paper-2 conducted by the National Testing Agency NTA to be eligible for admission. Application: The candidate must fill the application form of the respective college or university they wish to apply to. The application form may be available online or offline. The application fee also needs to be paid. Merit list: Based on the NATA or JEE Main Paper-2 score and other eligibility criteria, the college or university releases a merit list of selected candidates. Counseling: Selected candidates are called for counseling or interview rounds to further evaluate their eligibility for admission. Admission: The candidate must pay the admission fee and complete the admission process, which may include document verification, seat confirmation, and submission of required documents. As for the admission form, you can obtain it from the respective college or university's official website or admission office. You can fill the form online or download it and submit it offline. Be sure to check the deadline for submission of the form and other important dates related to the admission process.

faqs.answer: CUET eligibility requirements for Jamia Millia Islamia: Academic background:It is expected of you to have taken a class 12 or similar exam. admission_process.title: Jamia Millia Islamia Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: For the first time, students willing to appear for JMI admission were required to pass the CUET. The admission process is completely online for all courses. Mentioned below is a checklist that you can not miss if you are a Jamia Millia Islamia aspirant:
Step 1: Application

Candidates must apply for CUET andappearfor the exam. JMI accepts admission to three UG courses via CUET, namely, BA, BSc, and BVoc in specific specialisations. To know the exact courses and their details,download this PDF
Step 2: Registration
After the CUET UG result is out, those who have qualified for the exam must register at https://www.jmi.ac.in/ by paying the application fee (fee cost not available officially).
Step 3: Counselling Process
Selected candidates must attend the counselling round. Admission is offered based on a merit list prepared by JMI.
Step 4: Final Admission
Candidates need to report and pay the admission fee to confirm the seat in their desired programme.

The different components included in Jamia Millia Islamia fees are tuition fees, security deposits, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. The hostel fee at JMI for BSc and BTech is INR 4,800. Candidates shall be able to pay the fee annually or semester-wise. Below is the Jamia Milia Islamia fee for the popular courses:

Are you eligible?Students will also have to clear the Class 12 exam to be eligible for admission.

What's the exam pattern?The entrance test will consist of three sections with objective-type questions (MCQs). Checkthe CUEthe T Exam Patternhere and downloadthe JMI CUET UG admit cardbefore the exam.
What's the CtheUET syllabus?The exam will be strictly based on the Class 12 NCERT syllabus (according to media reports).

In how many languages can one appear for CUET 2026?There are a total of 13 languages (Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Gujarati, Odiya, Bengali, Assamese, Punjabi, English, Hindi and Urdu).

Jamia Millia Islamia MBA admission is based on the performance of candidates in the JMI Entrance Exam followed by a Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) round.

faqs.question: Does Jamia Millia Islamia accept CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jamia Millia Islamia accepts CUET scores for UG courses such as BA, BSc and BVoc. Jamia Millia Islamia admission is based on entrance exam score. The university released its prospectus for admissions in March with the schedule for admission to courses accepting national-level and university-level entrance exams. JMI, New Delhi offers over 220 courses in both regular and self-financed modes. The university also provides distance learning courses at undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), and Diploma levels.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Jamia Millia Islamia?
faqs.answer: Jamia Millia Islamia admission to UG and PG courses is entrance exams based. The university accepts JMI entrance exam, CUET and JEE Main for admission. Further, to be eligible for admission, students also need to pass Class 12 with 50% for admission to UG courses and a graduation degree with 50-55% aggregate for admission to PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the reservation percentage for Muslim candidates at JMI?
faqs.answer: Jamia Millia Islamia offers seat reservations in almost all the courses based on the category of the students. Candidates seekingJMI admissionunder the reserved category can apply for reservation under one category only and are required to fulfil the prescribed eligibility conditions of the course. More details regarding JMI reservation criteria are enlisted below:30% of the total number of seats in each course are reserved for Muslim applicants. 10% of the total number of seats in each course are reserved for women applicantswho are Muslims and 10% of the total number of seats in each course shall be earmarked for (OBCs) and ST students who are Muslims.5% of seats in all the courses are reserved for physically challenged students.5% of seats in all courses must be filled by internal students of Jamia who have passed their qualifying exam from Jamia schools as regular students.More details on the reservation criteria and relaxation offered to students across course eligibility are avai

faqs.question: Can I get into JMI with 50 percentile?
faqs.answer: As per theJMI cutoff 2024for the Round 13 seat allotment, candidates won't be able to get into JMI with50percentile forM.Sc in Biotechnology, which is the only course available for the General AI category candidates.

placement_data.title: Jamia Millia Islamia Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The 2025 placement data has been released for MCA and MSc Bioinformatics. The highest salary offered to MCA and MSc Bioinformatics students during 2025 placements was INR 18.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA . The placement rate for MCA was 46% . The MCA average salary stood at INR 7.85 LPA . TCS, IBM, and Newgen were some of the renowned companies.

The University has released the annual report 2024 incorporating the 2024 placement stats. The highest salary offered to the 2024 batch was INR 59.91 LPA and was offered to BTech Computer Engineering students. For MBA, the highest salary stood at INR 24 LPA. The total number of students placed during Jamia Millia Islamia placements 2024 was 330. The number of BTech Electrical Engineering students placed was 54 . The highest and lowest salary offered to BTech EE students was INR 22 LPA and INR 2.2 LPA .

description: Jamia Millia Islamia cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Jamia Millia Islamia cutoff 2025 was released via Jamia entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 17752 and 51961 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 17752, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 17752.

highlights.description:
Jamia Millia Islamia is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies, both national & international, have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #13 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Overall, #4 under University, #24 under Engineering, #28 under Management, and #8 under Law. At the global level, the QS World 2025 ranked the institute at #851-900 position. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Jamia Millia Islamia rankings.
Read less

nirf.description:
Jamia Millia Islamia has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Jamia Millia Islamia's rank is #13, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Jamia Millia Islamia fell 1 rank to #4 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Jamia Millia Islamia's rank is #24, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Jamia Millia Islamia fell 3 ranks to #28 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Jamia Millia Islamia latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

outlook.description:
Jamia Millia Islamia has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Dental (Government)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Jamia Millia Islamia indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Dental (Government)' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Jamia Millia Islamia's rank is #6, the same as last year's rank in the 'Dental (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'Law (Government)' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Jamia Millia Islamia's rank is #6, the same as last year's rank in the 'Law (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Jamia Millia Islamia outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Jamia Millia Islamia's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have shown an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, Jamia Millia Islamia climbed 90 ranks to #761 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Asia' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Jamia Millia Islamia fell 9 ranks to #197 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The 'Southern Asia' category rankings of the institute have shown an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Jamia Millia Islamia climbed 1 rank to #33 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

highlights: Students with physical disabilities whose parents' annual incomes do not surpass INR 1.50 lakh are exempted from paying room rent
For NRI students, a fixed 1000 $USD will be charged as annual hostel charges.

hostel.description: There are seven Boys hostels accommodating about 1200 students. Admission to the hostels is exclusively on the basis of merit as per admission criteria for the course in which he is admitted at the time of his admission to the hostel. Hostels are equipped with the mess, dining halls, Gymnasium, and wifi facility. Begum Hazrat Mahal Girls’ Hostel is equipped with a Dining Hall, laundry areas, bathrooms with solar heaters, Reading Hall, Common Room with a T.V, a Gymnasium, Canteen/Tuck shop, a Beauty parlor and a splendid stage providing the resident's space for practice and performances.

library.description: Jamia Milia's Zakir Hussain Central Library is an air-conditioned library with a collection of 3.70 lakh books. It has a reading hall with seating capacity for 1275 users. The Digital Resource Centre facilitates access to e-Journals and other in-house digitized e-resources. Learning Centre for Differently Abled provides support to visually impaired students through assistive technology. A federated search tool, Knimbus, is available to search journal articles in multiple databases.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Athletics Track, Jogging Track, Hockey Ground, Fitness Centre, Snooker Room, Lawn Tennis Court

reviews.review_heading: College is very good and the faculty is very helpful in every advice or term.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good. The Wi-Fi and the canteen food are also decent. Sports happen every month, and a lot of students participate in them. Prizes are also decent, like vouchers and electronic gadgets, which are very helpful for students and increase their productivity.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable and superb infrastructure college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-class. Although the area is not that big because of the Delhi location, the overall infrastructure is the best. Jamia has its sports complex where Ranji matches are also held, and all facilities are available. Hostel charges are about Rs. 40,000 per year, including mess and accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the overall experience, good environment, and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are well maintained and have all the basic necessities like Wi-Fi and air-conditioned libraries. The campus has decent infrastructure. The washrooms are not that great and need regular cleaning. Classrooms are well-ventilated. The food quality in the mess and the canteen is average but eatable. Medical facilities are barely provided. There is a huge sports complex at gate number 3.

reviews.review_heading: Jamia Millia Islamia review
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facility was available. A central library was present. Classrooms were integrated with digital TV. The quality of the hostel was extremely good, but the hostel capacity was very less, so most students could not get hostel accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jamia Millia Islamia.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are good. A central library is present. The hostel quality and our faculty members are good. All essential facilities are available. Food and canteen food are good.

reviews.review_heading: Development extension - Professional course.
reviews.review_text: All the students had access to Wi-Fi and library. Library at Jamia was very good, and the classrooms of the department were average. The hostel was very good. The quality of food was also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by A.J.K. Mass Communication Research CentreReviewed on 24 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for mass communication.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facility was available. A central Library was present. The quality of the hostel was awesome, but it's rare to get a hostel. A medical facility was available in the college. A sports and games complex was available.

reviews.review_heading: It's a beautiful campus and a well-reputed university, and the teaching staff is great.
reviews.review_text: The hostel accommodation began by December, while I secured a seat in August itself. So it got a little difficult for me. The room is nice, spacious with a 3 seater, food was okay, we used to get veg and non-veg both. The quality was not great but decent. Seats are very much limited, this is one issue. The hostel is 1.5 km away from the college. Hostel fee is INR 48,000 per year. They need improvement in terms of class infrastructure, smart boards and projects are needed.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the quality of the course.
reviews.review_text: Our department is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi, AC, a water purifier, and a projector. To conduct experiments, all necessary facilities are available in our lab, including RT-PCR, qPCR, BSL-2, a cell culture room, and a Virus culture lab. Our university has a central library near my department, where you can issue any two books for 14 days. The central canteen has good quality food at a cheap rate, and many other shops are also there. Cricket ground and other sports grounds are working, you ca...

reviews.review_heading: JMI: A central university in New Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms have AC for 2nd year students onwards, and the seats are good. Sometimes issues are faced that are resolved within a few days. Wi-Fi is available. FET library is working from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM on weekdays. The central library in a block remains open from 9:00 AM-2:AM, except national holidays.

reviews.review_heading: Very good faculty and very nice experience.
reviews.review_text: There are six boys' hostels named F.R.K, A.P.J, B.R.A, A.M.K, Kelat, and S.R.K (Alma Iqbal is not available right now). The hostels and mess are very affordable, with hygienic and nutritious food. The engineering department has one big building with different sections for different departments. The library has AC and Wi-Fi connection.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, but 2024 was not a good year for engineering.
reviews.review_text: All five departments, Computer, Electronic, Electrical, Mechanical, and Civil, have a common building. There is one separate building for the library and reading room, fully air-conditioned with centralized Wi-Fi. Electrical Engineering classes have no AC. In Jamia, there are 7 boys' hostels and 3 girls' hostels. The mess is hygienic and very affordable. Hostel costs around Rs. 40,000 per year for mess and accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, everything is okay.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. Department is also good. Wi-Fi is good. Classrooms are not too much good. Library is excellent. The food quality is not too much good in mess. Canteen food is good. Medical facilities are free which is good. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placement but very good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The quality of mess food is good, especially in A.P.J. hostel and F.R.K. hostel. There are 3 girls' hostels and 6 or 7 boys' hostels, and there are many canteens in Jamia with affordable prices. Sports facilities are available, as well as a clinic. The engineering department has one building, and there is another building for the reading room and library.

reviews.review_heading: 2022 is the best year for electrical engineering.
reviews.review_text: The overall campus is good. The buildings are good, and the dentistry building is very nice, well-maintained, and well-designed. The engineering department has a personal library and reading room, and all 5 departments of engineering have a common building. There are a total of 6 boys' hostels and 3 girls' hostels. The mess is hygienic, and the food is decent at a reasonable price. Jamia has a sports complex and a free clinic for students.

data.description: Jamia Millia Islamia University has an experienced faculty with good knowledge backed by significant various research contributions. Jamia Millia Islamia has an experienced faculty who are degree, PhD, diploma, and various certificate holders. Jamia Millia Islamia University also invites faculty for various guest lectures and therefore tries to offer an opportunity for students to talk with some of the best and most experienced personalities and therefore learn from them.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jamia Millia Islamia

likes.text: Many students got placed in companies like DMRC, Big Oh Tech, TCS, XenonStack, Infosys, Newgen Software, Larsen and Toubro Limited, etc.
Placements are very good but not excellent because many of my friends did not get any placements from the college, But except for the placements, the college is excellent.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Good infrastructure, well-maintained library, neat and clean classroom,  hi-speed Wi-Fi is available, good environment, and the labs are well-furnished with all the required equipment.
Our college also has its own sports complex in which we get basketball, football, cricket, and many sports infrastructure.
The quality of the facilities in our hostel is very good & provides good quality of food or available in the mess and canteen.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Our teachers were helpful, qualified, and useful in all manners with a refined quality of knowledge related to this course.
The syllabus of this course is very good, if a student focus on their efforts then they will get ready for the industry.

Faculty.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: I want to pursue engineering, and I have cleared JEE Mains, but the fee of Jamia is very low, which is very suitable for me.
The academic year is covered with cultural events, fests, sports events, and many other extracurricular activities in our college.

admission_process.title: Institute of Dental Studies and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Institute of Dental Studies and Technology course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. reviews.review_heading: Very nice college. I highly recommend it.
reviews.review_text: Nice labs and infrastructure. Even in the hostel, Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel provides both staying and food facilities. The dental labs, where students work and do all the practical work, are nice and provide all kinds of materials that we need while performing them.

reviews.review_heading: According to my point of view college is good.
reviews.review_text:
There are so many facilities in my college like central library, Wi-Fi campus, pathology lab, microbiology lab etc. Classroom is also good. Hostel is also good there is a canteen in our college which is very good. In our college mayo hospital give service 24 * 7 hour
.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty and the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There is Wi-Fi on hostel's every floor, library, classrooms, and labs. The classrooms are well-designed and fully equipped with technology. There is simulation lab, cad, cam, and many other facilities. In this college, MS is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for dental studies in NCR.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is getting excellent day by day. Our college is greatly concerned about the quality of the food being served. The hostel facilities are excellent for both boys and girls. We like to play most games here, like volleyball, cricket, and football.

college_info.intro:
MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Bangalore comprises of more than 50 departmnets including Engineering & Technology, Dental Science, Managemnet & Commerce, Life & Allied Health Science, Arts & Design, Nursing, and others. BTech and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the institute.
Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The institute offers BTech specilisation in Aerospace Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automotive Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Robotics Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Ramaiah University Bangalore is a two year programme. Below mentioned are the MSRUAS popular programmes:

review_content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average hovered around 6 LPA. Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank are among the recruiters. Finance and consulting firms offered internships. There are fewer tier-1 roles, according to some students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70-75% of the students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 12 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Ashok Leyland, Bosch, Mahindra, and Tata Motors were among the top recruiters. Auto factories and R&D companies offered internships, but the core job roles were more restricted than those of IT-based profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

review_summary.college_name: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued(Dec 2025)- B.Sc. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Mediocre because of no placements or internship opportunities, yet the infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: Around 5-6 students enrolled in the year I took admission. Next year, there were 11-12 students who took admission. There are no placement opportunities or internships provided by our college, which is a huge satisfaction, given that we pay so many fees. There are no recruiting companies that come for placements.
content.Infrastructure: There's everything, the classrooms are very spacious, and there are smart boards, there's Wi-Fi, labs, and a library as well, which has plenty of books required for all the departments. The hostels are very clean and tidy. The food is very yummy and also hygienic. You can get all sorts of food, ranging from South Indian to North Indian and even snacks. There's a medical college and a hospital right next to our building, so medical help is always readily available. There are also sports tournaments and club activities that keep happening from time to time. The infrastructure and teaching quality are too good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: We are still in our first year and are the followers of the pilot batch. We have heard companies such as AB and GE have come to place, and a few other industries located in Peenya, with packages of 2.5 to 5 LPA. ABB and GE are a few companies that have selected our seniors. We are still in our first year, so we have just heard it from our seniors. A few companies are giving a stipend of 8000.
content.Infrastructure: College food and mess are always pathetic. As per my friends who are staying in the hostel, they have reviewed it as good food in the hostel. However, the college canteen pricing was cheap, but the food quality was not up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.

content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average hovered around 6 LPA. Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank are among the recruiters. Finance and consulting firms offered internships. There are fewer tier-1 roles, according to some students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automotive Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.

content.Placements: Approximately 70-75% of the students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 12 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Ashok Leyland, Bosch, Mahindra, and Tata Motors were among the top recruiters. Auto factories and R&D companies offered internships, but the core job roles were more restricted than those of IT-based profiles.

The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computational Social Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied within a year with great facilities and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: A lot of roles are offered in very high-verified job sites, like the companies TCS, Infosys, IBM, Amazon, and also Google, with an average salary package depending on the department, but in a range of 4-7 LPA, with the highest domestic package reaching up to 52 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The food and infrastructure are top-notch, except for the Wi-Fi issues. I am not using any hostel right now, but based on what I heard, this is the thing they face; they have a proper curfew and good food, which properly provides the needed nutrients.

admission_overview.college_name: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MS Ramaiah University (MSRUAS) admissions are open. Ramaiah University offers UG & PG courses in the stream of Science, Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Humanities, etc. For the majority of courses, students are required to appear for RUAS AT, which is the MS Ramaiah entrance exam. The university in addition to conducting its own entrance test, accepts state-level entrance exams such as PGCET, KCET, COMEDK, etc as well. For admission to BVoc course, MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers merit-based admission. Seats at the university are offered through a common counselling process to all the UG & PG courses. More details around Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences course admissions are elaborated below.

admission_process.title: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: MSRUAS admission processconsists of multiple steps. It includes applying online to RUASAT for entrance-based admission or registering for direct admission. More details aroundM.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences admission processare as follows:
Application Process

MSRUAS application process is conducted in online mode. Candidates can apply on the official website for their desired programme. An application fee of INR 2000 needs to be paid through online gateway.
Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on entrance exams for all of the courses except for the BVoc programme. The university conducts RUAS-AT for admission to the remaining programmes. Alternatively, valid scores of other national-level exams including CUET/ NEET/ JEE or state-level exams - KCET/ COMEDK are also accepted,
Counselling Process & Document Verification

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates are offered seats through common counselling process. Candidates who get selected must download and fill an admission form on the university's official website. After filling the form, candidates need to pay a tuition fee and submit documents at the university for the verification.

MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences fee structuremay include components such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, caution deposit, etc. Some elements are to be paid only once, while the remaining are charged yearly or semesterly. The fee range includes multiple specialisations. The seat intake may change every academic year. Students can check the table below to know about the intake andMS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences feesfor some of the popular courses:
Note: This data is from official sources and can change.

courses_data.description: MSRUAS offers a full-timeMBAprogramme at Gnanagangothri Campus. There are nine specialisations available for this programme. Admission to this course is entrance-based. Candidates are admitted based on their scores obtained inPGCET examconducted byKEA. To be eligible for the programme, candidates must be graduated in the relevant stream. More details around MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences MBA admissions are as follows:

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at MS Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a two-year MBA course at Ramaiah University is INR 8 lakh. The fee is calculated based on first-year fee. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same. Apart from this, there are several other components that need to be paid during the submission of fee along with the tuition fee.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA at MSRUAS?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences (MSRUAS) is 240. The programme is offered in 9 specializations and has a duration of 2 years. Candidates must have a graduation degree with 50% marks and must appear and qualify the Postgraduate Common Entrance Test (PGCET) for admission. The university also considers scores of other national-level entrance exams for the final seat allotment.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at MS Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: For admission to MBA course, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. MS Ramaiah accepts a valid score of PGCET exam, which is a state-level entrance exam, conducted by KEA. This exam is particularly conducted for admission of students to PG courses.

faqs.question: Which MBA specialisations does MS Ramaiah University offer?
faqs.answer: MS Ramaiah University offers admission to MBA through the Department of Management Studies. This course is offered across nine specialisations. These are Marketing Management, Human Resource Management, Operations Management, Financial Management, Small Business and Entrepreneurship, Banking and Financial Services, etc.

Further, a counselling process is conducted for the final seat allotment. More details aroundMSRUAS BTech admissionare as follows:

faqs.question: What is fee structure of BTech at M.S. Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a four-year BTech course at Ramaiah University ranges from INR 7.2 Lacs - INR 21 lakh. The fee is calculated based on first-year fee. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same. Apart from this, there are several other components that need to be paid during the submission of fee along with the tuition fee.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat in BTech course at Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: For admission to BTech or BTech (Lateral Entry) course at Ramaiah University, students need to fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The next step is to either qualify for the university's in-house entrance exam RUASAT or state-level entrance exams such as KCET/ COMED K with a valid score. The selected candidates are given seats based in the respective counselling session.

faqs.question: Who are eligible for BTech at Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to BTech at Ramaiah University, students need to fulfil minimum eligibility criteria, i.e., to pass Class 12 with 45% with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory courses along with Chemistry, Biotechnology, Biology, Electronics or Computer science. Students who belong to reserved category are required to get 40% aggregate in the same. The eligibility criteria for BTech (Lateral Entry) is also the same.

faqs.question: Does MS Ramaiah have entrance exam for BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, for admission to BTech and BTech (Lateral Entry) courses, MS Ramaiah conducts in-house entrance exams, i.e., RUASAT. This exam is particularly conducted for admission of students to its UG courses. Students can get admisison to BTech after qualifying for this exam. Those who are willing to get admission through this exam, need to apply for this exam on the official website of MSURAS by paying an application amount of INR 1,250.

faqs.question: Does MSRUAS accept KCET score?
faqs.answer: Yes, KCET exam is accepted by MSRUAS for admission to BTech programme. Along with that, candidates can also secure admission based on a valid JEE Main exam. Candidates applying for admission within a valid KCET rank of 5,000 are offered a scholarship of INR 30,000.

faqs.question: What is the Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences COMEDK Cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: The Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences COMEDK Cutoff 2025 was released for all categories and rounds. The COMEDK Cutoff 2025 ranged from39103to109381as per the last round closing ranks for the General AI category. The COMEDK cutoff is applicable for admissions to various BTech specialisation atM.S Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Ramaiah University Bangalore without CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, students seeking MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences admission can apply for their preferred courses without the need for appearing for the NTA CUET exam. Students can apply on the basis of the RUASAT test conducted by the university itself for the majority of courses. Further, the university also accepts scoring from other entrance tests such as COMEDK UGET, Uni-GAUGE, KCET, Karnataka PGCET, GATE, among others.

faqs.question: Does MS Ramaiah have entrance exam for admissions?
faqs.answer: MS Ramaiah University (MSRUAS) admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates who want to apply for the UG/ PG courses are required to appear for RUASAT. Moreover, the candidates who want a Ph.D. course admissions must appear for RUASAT followed by a presentation round. Moreover, courses like B.Tech, BDS and MS accept national-level entrance scores like JEE, KCET COMEDK, and NEET respectively.

The department trains the students in various areas like Personality Development, Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Verbal Reasoning, Group Discussion techniques , etc. It invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The top recruiters of MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences in 2024 included L&T, Motherhood Hospital, TCS, Cognizant, HCL, Wipro, Accenture, IBM, Infosys , etc.

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences climbed 50 ranks to #101 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences climbed 12 ranks to #56 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences fell 6 ranks to #22 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: Mediocre because of no placements or internship opportunities, yet the infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: There's everything, the classrooms are very spacious, and there are smart boards, there's Wi-Fi, labs, and a library as well, which has plenty of books required for all the departments. The hostels are very clean and tidy. The food is very yummy and also hygienic. You can get all sorts of food, ranging from South Indian to North Indian and even snacks. There's a medical college and a hospital right next to our building, so medical help is always readily available. There are also sports tournamen...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: College food and mess are always pathetic. As per my friends who are staying in the hostel, they have reviewed it as good food in the hostel. However, the college canteen pricing was cheap, but the food quality was not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Faculty of Engineering and Technology, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied SciencesReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.
reviews.review_text: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied within a year with great facilities and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The food and infrastructure are top-notch, except for the Wi-Fi issues. I am not using any hostel right now, but based on what I heard, this is the thing they face; they have a proper curfew and good food, which properly provides the needed nutrients.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was well-equipped with all major facilities such as Wi-Fi, showers, etc. Shared rooms were available (2 in 1 room). Each room had a chair and study table for each student, along with separate cupboards. The fees were  Rs.45,000 per year, and the mess fees were around Rs.4,000 a month. The food quality was a total disaster. My advice would be to take a flat outside the campus and have good food. University hostel facilities in both the Peenya campus and the Gangotri campus had good roo...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels provided single and shared rooms, with prices ranging from Rs.35,000 to Rs.60,000 per room, including electricity charges. Food was not included.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms were good as my friend resides in the hostel. I used to go to his room in my free time. Room was shared as 2 students were residing in a room. There were separate things for both students in a room like a wardrobe, bed, table, and 2 chairs. College had PG named 555-PG. Mess fee was Rs 4,000 for every month which included breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: It's good as it has a hostel inside the college with all live home facilities where it's been provided with a gym, yoga, sports room, club room, and party room. Each room is provided with a self-system for the students living for their usage, food is good and they provide to your room 3 times a day. This course is meant for me to join the top companies in which the Ramaiah has been liked with that companies and they are giving very good facilities to the students. My dream is to become a very go...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Faculty of Engineering and Technology, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied SciencesReviewed on 13 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has an environment to find minded people and grow with part of difficulties and blockades.
reviews.review_text: We have special rooms for boys and girls known as a sac with an in-built gym and other board games as well. There is a ground for football, cricket, and indoor courts as well. The hostel is average with okay food. It has a 3-star hostel. Timings are preferred for students.

reviews.review_heading: There are no placements yet by the college, but it's a great experience to learn the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, with classrooms, places to eat, and good sanitation practices. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms have interactive boards to help us with our academics and course understanding. There is a huge park, wide corridors, a huge food street, and good parking facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by M S Ramaiah Medical CollegeReviewed on 24 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Future leaders from MS Ramaiah Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is present within the MS Ramaiah Medical Hospital. There are 1300+ special beds available for explaining practical cases to students. The campus area is expansive and broad, and it is quite peaceful, amazing, and relaxing.

reviews.review_heading: A brief review of Ramaih College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is the main highlight of the college. The campus is vast comprising 13 different faculty members like engineering, medical, dental, etc. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, labs are equipped with all the necessary instruments and chemicals. Classes are high-teach comprising smartboard speakers, and comfortable seats for individual students. The library is on the third floor where all the required books are available we can get them for 3 or 15 days. The hostel i...

reviews.review_heading: A college that everyone should check out. It has a really good faculty and a big, beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities wise, it is really great. Classrooms have Wi-Fi, and each table has separate charging ports for laptops or mobile phones. There are projectors, speakers, and more. The campus has a vast library, places to relax, an indoor sports complex, and other amenities. The quality of the hostel is good, and more hostels are being built. The food is also good and of high quality.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good overall.
reviews.review_text: We have one lab but 2-3 batches have lab classes at the same time. We have to find some other classrooms which are empty for the lab. The hostel is too bad. The food is not bad and many get food poisoning. Water is also not good and it is not purified. The bathing water is in yellow or brown colors a few times.

paragraphs: Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences provides two types of scholarships. Students can choose to apply for an Admission Test Scholarship or a Merit Scholarship. It is to note that Merit Scholarship can either be a Scholarship of Excellence or a Scholarship of Distinction. Besides, students can avail loans, government and non-government scholarships.  In an academic year, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences students are eligible for only one Admission Test or Merit Scholarship.

college_info.intro: Galgotias University provides different primary (here refers to undergraduate), Postgraduate and PhD programmes in more than 15 departments. The famous courses include BTech, BBA, BSc, BCA, and MBA. Students need to competent with the eligibility criteria to be able to apply for the courses. The university eligibility ranges from course to course. The university offers BTech specialisation in Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Bio-Medical, and others. Galgotia University Greater Noida BTech fee can go from INR 1.6 lakh to INR 6 lakh. Selection is based on JEE entrance exams. The university also offers MBA specialisation in Financial, Aviation, Tourism & Travel, Fintech, and others. Below mentioned are the Galgotias University popular programmes:

While, the Median package offered by Galgotias University after completion of B.Sc. is INR 240,000 - INR 410,000. Basis these stats, Amity University, Lucknow is better option compared to Galgotias University on the Median salary parameter.

A:    SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University and Galgotias University both are renowned universities for B.Sc. However, in terms of affordability, SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University is a better option since the total tuition fee for SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University is INR 58,500 - INR 394,000 and the total tuition fee for B.Sc. at Galgotias University is INR 135,000 - INR 555,000. 
In the total fees that students generally end up paying the university or the college, various other components are also included, such as the exam fee, application fee, lab and other charges.
faqs.question: Which college is more affordable for B.Sc. among SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University and Galgotias University?

faqs.answer: A:    Galgotias University has affordable fee structure. The GCET Greater Noida fee structure ranges between INR 5K- INR 6.16 lakh. The institute includes fee structure includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, laboratory fees, security deposit, alumni fees, etc. Some of these are one-time payments that are charged by Galgotia University Greater Noida at the time of admission.
faqs.question: How costly is Galgotias University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Galgotias University inducts candidates for the majority of its courses based on marks in the qualifying examinations. For admission to the UG programmes across various specialisations at Galgotias University candidates will get selected based on their marks in class 12 as the qualifying examination for UG courses is class 12. Hence, candidates seeking admission to the UG courses at Galgotias University must have valid marks in class 12.For admission to BTech and BA LLB, candidates are also selected based on their scores in JEE-Main and CLAT, respectively. Therefore, candidates based on their marks in class 12 or the required entrance examination will be selected for further admission rounds followed by document verification and fee payment leading to final seat allotment.

faqs.answer: Yes, the MBA course at Galgotias University follows the semester pattern. Galgotias University offers MBA with a two-year course duration where the students complete the coursework in more than one Managemet discipline. There are two semesters in an academic year, and therefore systematic learning and assessments are smoothly run throughout. This is the structure whereby, at the freshman level, students could pick subjects from various domains; in subsequent semesters, they would further their learning. A semester-wise format offers students the added ability to handle workloads in the semesters.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for the BTech course at Galgotias University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the BTech course at Galgotias University ranges from INR 1.40 lakh to INR 6 lakh. The duration of the course is between 3-5 years. The university usually conducts GEEE to shortlist candidates for the BTech programme. Candidates who have passed UPSEE/ JEE Main can also apply. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for BTech courses:Selection criteria: Merit-basedEligibility for BTech/ BTech (Hons): A pass in Class 12 with a minimum of 60% aggregate in Physics/ Chemistry/ Mathematics.Eligibility for BTech in Agriculture Engineering: A pass in Class 12 in PCM/ PCB with at least 60% aggregate.

overview_faqs.answer: The university offers one platform for candidates to check any course fees. To access the portal, candidates are required to visit the official website of Galgotias University and click on the fee structure tab. Here, students can choose the courses they want to enroll. It will redirect candidates to course fee structure page. From the redirect page candidates can check the fee for any courses they want to opted for.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing BBA at Galgotias University?
overview_faqs.answer: Galgotias University offers BBA courses in top specialisations of the field, which is inclusive of Aviation Management, Business Analytics, Tourism & Travel Management, etc. Moreover, students can also pursue four-year courses in BBA (Hons in Research) programmes. The university offers impressive scholarships to students to meritorious students and 100% tuition fee waivers are offered to the toppers of all the Board/University.Recently, Galgotias University has been ranked 12 by TIMES for its BBA course. As per the recent placement records, the average package was recorded at 5.4 LPA. Overall, the university can be a decent choice to pursue BBA course.

review_summary.college_name: Galgotias University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Something creepy about my university.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact placement percentage. But the average package is 7-8 LPA. I think for freshers it's okay. I think that most placements are in Tata company, as I myself, in my 1st semester, got a chance of an industry visit in Tata company. So it's good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is not too good for girls. But you get late-night access to the university library, and the mess food is average. There's a big playground and many sports available. The gym is also good. Classrooms are active learning based, and the university infrastructure is amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It has a good environment and security.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed, and roles are basically for software designers, developers or artificial intelligence students who are studying at this university. Many companies like TCS and other companies are willing to enter and take the students from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and quality of food are quite good. Wi-Fi is available in every room of the hostel, and the medical staff is quite helpful. Various types of sports and games are available for hostel students, and anybody can play at any time. The library is quite big.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is totally awesome.

content.Placements: As I study in this college, I have seen many of my seniors who have passed out and are working happily at various places. Therefore, there are no problems regarding placements. This is a guarantee that you will get placed somewhere. It is a reliable institution.
content.Infrastructure: As I study in this college right now. The infrastructure is totally awesome and can't be matched by many nearby colleges, hence no one can doubt that there are different blocks for each core branch, and several labs are there that are totally dedicated.

individual_reviews.course: BCA with Industry Oriented Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and best campus facilities. Skill-focused college with supportive teachers.

content.Placements: My college has good placements. Mostly, students who have good skills get 100% placement, and even those who put in a little hard work are easily able to get placed. The highest package 1.5 crores and the lowest package is 5-6 LPA. Mostly, students are placed in non-teaching companies. The top recruiting companies are Amazon and Deloitte.
content.Infrastructure: My course department has good infrastructure. We have Wi-Fi labs, classrooms, and a library, and everything works fine. The hostel facilities are overall okay. The mess food is not bad, but the taste of the food is decent. All the basic medical facilities are available. And we have proper grounds for both outdoor and indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Dual Specialization - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Galgotias University one of the best university.

content.Placements: 50 percent are placed in my MBA course. 18 LPA is the highest package offered in MBA. EY, KPMG, HDFC, Deloitte, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. 80 percent of students got internship from the college, and the companies are BNY, Agile Capital Services, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom, infrastructure, and the library are fully well developed. E-library contains all books, and the seating area is so impressive. Hostel rooms are fully furnished, and the food in the mess is cooked with hygiene. Students from other states and countries also get their local food to make them feel familiar and better.
