admission_process.title: Galgotias University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Galgotias University admission follows a three-step admission process. Find below all the steps of the Galgotias University admission process:
1 - Galgotias University Application Process
Candidates seeking admission to their desired courses at Galgotias University must apply through the university’s official website by paying the required application fee.
3 - Galgotias University Selection Criteria/ Entrance Exam

Galgotias University inducts candidates for most of its courses through score in the qualifying examinations. Also,B.A. LLB and BTech admission atGalgotias University accepts scores of some of the national level exams such asCLAT and JEE-Mainrespectively. Hence, candidates aspiring to get admission at Galgotias University must score well in thequalifying examination orentrance examdepending upon the requirement of that programme.
3 - Galgotias University Final Seat Allotment

Candidates who have valid marks in the qualifying examination or required entrance exam will be selected for further admission process. The candidates then have to report to the admission cell at Galgotias University forverification ofdocumentandfee paymentleading to final seat allotment.
Galgotias University fees for different courses range between INR 5 K and INR 8 L. Candidates can pay the fee annually or semester-wise depending on course-requirement.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the major reasons why many students leave a degree or a college. Although the availability of student loans and financial aid has made education accessible, but qualifying the eligibility requirements for loans and scholarships is often difficult. faqs.answer: Galgotias University BBA admission is entirely merit-based. The admission process for BBA is a three step process. Candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements and proceed for the admission. Find below the steps including in the Galgotias University BBA admission process 2024:Application Process:Candidates have to apply online on the official website of the university. They have to pay an application fee of INR 1,100 along with submitting the important documents.Selection Round

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for Galgotias University admissions?
faqs.answer: The entrance exam accepted by Galgotias University include JEE Main/UPSEE/ CLAT/GMAT/ MAT/CAT/ GMAT/CMAT/ NMAT/CUET. The university conducts Galgotias Engineering Entrance Examination (GEEE) for the BTech course and Galgotias University Management Aptitude Test (GUMAT) for the MBA course. Also, the university is also conducting counselling for CUET-specific courses. Candidates can proceed with the admission process for various UG courses through CUET UG scores by visiting the official website. Apart from the entrance exam candidates also needs to fulfil the eligibility criteria for the specific course.

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Galgotias University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
In the 'University' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2024, Galgotias University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, Galgotias University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, Galgotias University fell 7 ranks to #98 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Galgotias University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Galgotias University provides accommodation facility for both boys and girls. All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system, high-speed internet, and indoor games etc.

library.description: Galgotias University library is designed in three spacious, centrally air-conditioned halls with over 1,30,000 books, 30,000 e-books and 550+ national and international journals. The library has an access to electronic databases & online journals like EBSCOHOST, J-Gate, DELNET, IEEE.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis Room, Horse Riding, Athletics

The library has an access to electronic databases & online journals like EBSCOHOST, J-Gate, DELNET, IEEE.

cafeteria.description: Galgotias University has a well ventilated, spacious, centrally-located dining hall and cafeteria that provide wholesome fare to all students. The dining hall is managed by professional staff who provide hygienic and fresh vegetarian food.

hostel.description: Galgotias University provides accommodation facility for both boys and girls. All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system, high-speed internet, and indoor games etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis Room, Horse Riding, Athletics

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Something creepy about my university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is not too good for girls. But you get late-night access to the university library, and the mess food is average. There's a big playground and many sports available. The gym is also good. Classrooms are active learning based, and the university infrastructure is amazing.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment and security.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and quality of food are quite good. Wi-Fi is available in every room of the hostel, and the medical staff is quite helpful. Various types of sports and games are available for hostel students, and anybody can play at any time. The library is quite big.

reviews.review_heading: The college is totally awesome.
reviews.review_text: As I study in this college right now. The infrastructure is totally awesome and can't be matched by many nearby colleges, hence no one can doubt that there are different blocks for each core branch, and several labs are there that are totally dedicated.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and best campus facilities. Skill-focused college with supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: My course department has good infrastructure. We have Wi-Fi labs, classrooms, and a library, and everything works fine. The hostel facilities are overall okay. The mess food is not bad, but the taste of the food is decent. All the basic medical facilities are available. And we have proper grounds for both outdoor and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Galgotias University one of the best university.
reviews.review_text: Classroom, infrastructure, and the library are fully well developed. E-library contains all books, and the seating area is so impressive. Hostel rooms are fully furnished, and the food in the mess is cooked with hygiene. Students from other states and countries also get their local food to make them feel familiar and better.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placements, and positive campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in the college. Classrooms are big and clean. Labs are well-maintained for practical work. The library has enough books for study and exams. Hostel rooms are clean, and basic facilities like water, electricity, and Wi-Fi are available most of the time. Overall, the campus infrastructure is okay, comfortable, and helpful for study and hostel life.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges, go and take your admission there.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is free to use 24/7 hrs. There are multiple labs to do practicals. Classrooms are very neat and clean with air conditioning. Libraries are also there, which you can use whenever you want. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is really good, with not much oil. Medical facilities are available anytime. Sports and Games are also available, such as basketball and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: From all sides, this college is the best in the whole of Noida.
reviews.review_text: I would like to say just fantastic in every section. You will have 24/7 Wi-Fi. Health support. You will see every type of sport is available here. I will not show the pros of the college now, you will face a little pollution because the college is under construction, and you will face a little noise.

reviews.review_heading: I am quite satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: We have very advanced classrooms which have smart boards and a study system that includes active learning and group activities. In the hostel, we have good food and playgrounds for sports and a gym. In our canteen, the food is very hygienic and of good quality. There is also a medical room in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for education and training, but some teachers and timings should be changed.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my college are quite good, but only about 40–50 percent, because some facilities are managed by people from the South, and there is an accent issue. The classrooms and library are fully equipped with modern technology. The hostel is located inside the college campus, but the facilities are not very comfortable, so students prefer staying in PGs outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good overall, the campus is beautiful, and companies come to the university.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my university are more than expected. There is a Wi-Fi connection in all the blocks, smart classrooms, and a world-class library. Talking about the hostel, there are all the basic facilities including sports and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and the teaching is also very nice.
reviews.review_text: The university infrastructure is very good. The classes have an active learning format with round tables and high-speed Wi-Fi. The university library is very good and equipped with PCs and computers. The university also has many benches for students to sit outside of classes. Also, cafeteria food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It has scope for faculty growth, solid placements, and excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in Galgotias University. The best quality facilities are available in our hostel. The best quality of food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available. Everything is available here.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with coming to Galgotias University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for my course are very good. I am really satisfied with my decision. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are all easily accessible. Hostel facilities are also very good. The quality of food is very good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: University is good with decent placement, but very crowded with a huge number of events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good university provides India's first active learning building (AI&this). It has a smart classroom, a beautiful and huge library, and the university has a huge campus that has a 3D printing lab, a done lab, robotics lab, a huge cafeteria, and many more.

paragraphs: Galgotias University provides various merit and need-based scholarships to eligible students. Detailed information regarding the Galgotias University scholarships is mentioned below:
1. Merit Scholarship at the time of admission

Galgotias University provides scholarships to meritorious students at the time of admission based on academic performance in examinations prescribed by the University i.e Class 12 or Graduation, Rank/Score in All India/State Level Entrance/ Aptitude Test and candidates possessing exemplary skills in sports, performing arts or literary skills. Candidates' scholarship will continue to next year if he/she is able to maintain a CGPA of 8.0 or above and has no backlog of carry-over papers at the end of the previous year.
Details regarding the number of scholarships are mentioned below:
2. Sports Quota Scholarships
Under the Galgotias University Sports quota, candidates can secure admission at Galgotias University in two ways Direct Admission without Sports Trials and Admission with Sports Trials.
For more information regarding various Galgotias University scholarships, click here.

faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at DPSRU?

faqs.answer: Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University accepts CUET-PG scores for admission to most of the PG programmes such as MBA, MPT, etc. Aspirants with a valid score in CUET-PG can fill out the application form for the preferred PG programme. Besides, candidates should also meet the eligibility requirements i.e. graduation for all the PG courses.
faqs.question: Q: Is CUET-PG required for admission at DPSRU?

faqs.answer: Yes, Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University admission is merit-based on the basis of marks obtained in qualifying exams. For example, the UG level BPharma course, selection criteria are based on the aggregate of Class 12 marks of 3 subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/Biology. For candidates who have taken both Maths and Biology best of two will be considered.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good and affordable medical college.

content.Placements: Above 60% in the CBSE board in 12 the standard in the medical stream was the primary requirement for admission. B.Pharma has the highest percentage. They have collaborative programs with AIIMS. Internships are necessary in 6th year. Roles offered laboratory, head laboratory technician, and data manager.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure facilities with healthy and sanitary surroundings. There are comfortable classrooms equipped with smart boards with good ventilation. Library is equipped with a variety of books for different courses all necessary books available in the library. College has all the necessary equipment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied, and the infrastructure is more happening in 1 or 2 years.

content.Placements: Almost 70 to 80% of students from M. Pharm and MBA get placements. Some B. Pharma also gets placed. Companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Dr. Reddy Laboratories are top recruiters. Roles offered include analysis, research, and development. The highest package is around 12 to 13 LPA, while the lowest is 4 to 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Very nice infrastructure, well-maintained laboratories, and a fully air-conditioned lecture room. A big library in which all the author books are easily available. The hostel is very neat and clean within walking distance from the main academic building. Mess is also very nice.

admission_process.title: DPSRU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DPSRU admission processbegins with registration for the preferred programme. The application process usually starts in May and go on till June/ July. Candidates need to meet the course-specific eligibility to apply for a course. Below are the steps to get a seat in DPSRU:
STEP 1: DPSRU Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply online or collect the application form from the university campus. Candidates need to fill out the application form on the official website of the university. DPSRU has made clusters for various courses for the convenience of the applicants. For each cluster, a separate application must be made with an application fee of INR 1,000.
STEP 2: Selection
DPSRU selects candidates based on their merit and performance in the accepted exam. The university considers merit in the last qualifying exam for UG courses.
DPSRU UG Admission 2025:
Admission to UG courses such as BPharm, BPT, BSc, and other courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants should complete a minimum of Class 12 for admission.
DPSRU PG Admission 2025:
The selection for PG courses is based on scores of the candidates in CUET-PG or GPAT scores. The universty offers MPT, MPharm, MSc, etc. at the PG level.
DPSRU MBA Admission 2025:
Candidates must completed their graduation in relevant subjects with at least 55% aggregate and have a valid score in GPAT for some of the specialisations.
DPSRU PhD Admission 2025:
Candidates should have a valid score in GPAT, NET, SLET for admission in PhD programme. The university also conducts DPSRU Entrance Exam for PhD course.
STEP 3: Merit List & Counselling

The university releases a merit list based on the entrance exam score or merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants will be called one by one as per the merit list for admission for the courses. If the seat offered is acceptable, the documents will be checked with originals and all relevant submissions. Further, aspirants will need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

DPSRU fees include multiple components such as tuition fees, caution deposits, exam fees, hostel charges, etc. Candidates need to pay a caution deposit only once at the time of admission. All other fee components are paid annually. Once the candidate joins the courses or within one month of taking admission, they cannot ask for a refund. Below isDPSRU feesand intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

In case the candidate cancels his or her admission, he or she can apply for a fee refund. The fee will be refunded after a deduction of INR 1,000. No claim will be considered after the start of the classes. The complete process for refund will be processed through the student admission portal.

Out of the total intake, the university reserves some seats for the reserved category candidates. Candidates must hold the documents supporting the claim to avail the reservation benefit. Below is category-wise DPSRU seat reservation percentage:

MBA fee is a sum of mutiple components such as caution deposit, hostel charges, exam fee, etc. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 in the start to register for a programme.

faqs.question: How many marks are necessary for M.Pharm. in Clinical Research at Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University?
faqs.answer: To get admission in M.PHARM in CLINICAL RESEARCH you should be GPAT qualified with good rank and you should have scored minimum 60% (aggregation of all semester) in your bachelor's.You may get admission directly if you have completed your bachelor's from DPSRU but the priority will be the GPAT qualified candidates.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for DPSRU Delhi admission?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University admission will depend on the course and level of the course the candidates wish to opt for. Here is a general overview: Application forms for all courses began on May 16, 2025 with applications ending on May 20, 2025 except for candidates opting for lateral entry into BPharm. However, the last date for PG course applications is 14 days after the announcement of the CUET/GPAT Result.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at DPSRU Delhi?
faqs.answer: No, Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University does not offer any form of direct admission. Interested candidates who wish to apply must upload the qualifying marksheet with seat allocation depending on it and competition for their preferred location/institute. Candidates must report for admission with hard copies of the required documents.

faqs.question: When do admissions begin at Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University?
faqs.answer: Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University admissions usually begin inMaywith the application process. The applications for UG and Diploma courses continues tillJunewhereas, the application deadline for PG courses is inJuly. Candidates can apply online or collect the form from the university campus.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for DPSRU admission?
faqs.answer: Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University considers course-specific eligibility for admission. Aspirants will also need to appear for entrance exam for PG courses. Below is DPSRU eligibility criteria for top courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBPharmClass 12 with PCM/ PCB with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD)MBABachelor's degree in relevant disciplines with at least 55% aggregateDPharmClass 12 with PCM/ PCB with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD)MPTBPT with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PBC/ PwD)BMLTClass 12 with PCM/ PCB with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD)

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in DPSRU?
faqs.answer: Candidates are offered seat in Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University based on their merit or entrance-exam score. The university considers merit in the last qualifying exam for UG courses. For admission to PG courses, CUET-PG score is considered. The university accepts GPAT for MPharm programme. Aspirants will be called one by one as per the merit list for admission for the courses. Once the seat is allocated, candidate needs to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can I get Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University, MBA with 88% in GPAT?
faqs.answer: Although 88% on the GPAT is a good score, entrance to Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University's MBA programme may not be assured with that score alone. Less emphasis is given on GPAT in the MBA programme at DPSRU, which clearly employs the Delhi Pharma Entrance Test (DPET) result.Your application may be strengthened by a high GPAT score, but it won't be the main deciding factor in your selection.The number of applications, DPET exam difficulty, and available seats are some of the elements that determine the minimum cutoff scores for admission. Should the competition change, an 88% GPAT might be adequate this year, even though it wasn't in past years. Go to the DPSRU website and look for the official MBA cutoff scores from the prior year.

placement_data.title: DPSRU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University Annual Report 2023, the highest and average package offered during MBA/MPH/MSc/MHM placements 2023 stood at INR 15 LPA and INR 5.67 LPA , respectively. Further, the highest and average package offered during DPSRU MPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 15 LPA and INR 6.84 LPA , respectively. Apart from this, according to NIRF Report 2024 released by the University, the median package offered during DPSRU BPharm and MPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 3.66 LPA and INR 5.65 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: Which sector has placed the most no. of DPSRU Delhi students?
faqs.answer: According to data on Linkedin and official statements from Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences & Research University the Research sector has placed the most no. of Alumni from DPSRU, with Healthcare coming as a close second. Students at DPSRU Delhi have secured promising roles across Formulation Development, Clinical Research, Regulatory Affairs, Business Analysis, Healthcare, Research & Development, HEOR, Hospital & Community Pharmacy, and Sales & Marketing.

faqs.question: What is the reality of placements at DPSRU?
faqs.answer: DPSRU Delhi provides students with a vibrant placement landscape to students. The Training and Placement Cell at Delhi Pharmaceutical Science and Research University provides students with a holistic learning environment with events, trainings, seminars, etc. During the DPSRU placements 2025, the salary packages were offered in the range of INR 8-12 LPA. Top recruiters include Sun Pharma, WNS, AdametNext, Xogene, Wings, Cipla, Fresenius Kabi, Red Health, Chetra, Apothecaries, EBM Health, Eli Lilly, among others.

faqs.question: How are BPharma placements at Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University?
faqs.answer: Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University (DPSRU) has a 100% placement rate for all courses. The median package offered to B.Pharm students was INR 4.50 LPA for the 2021-2022 academic year. During the DPSRU placement drive 2022, more than 20 companies visited the campus, and a total of 49 students were placed in top companies such as Dr. Reddy’s, PharmaAce, ZS Associates, among others. Students were offered multiple roles such as Research, Pharmacovigilance, Analytics, Consulting, Ed-Tech, Marketing, Business Consulting, and HRM in addition to the core pharmacist profiles. According to the NIRF report 2023, a total of 106 out of 246 BPharma and MPharma students were placed during placements 2022. Delhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research (DIPSAR) has an average package of INR 4 LPA for B.Pharm students, and the top recruiting companies include Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Dr. Reddy.

hostel_campus.college_name: DPSRU Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good and affordable medical college.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure facilities with healthy and sanitary surroundings. There are comfortable classrooms equipped with smart boards with good ventilation. Library is equipped with a variety of books for different courses all necessary books available in the library. College has all the necessary equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied, and the infrastructure is more happening in 1 or 2 years.
reviews.review_text: Very nice infrastructure, well-maintained laboratories, and a fully air-conditioned lecture room. A big library in which all the author books are easily available. The hostel is very neat and clean within walking distance from the main academic building. Mess is also very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BPT course in Delhi Pharmaceutical Science and Research.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite spacious, but time-to-time renovation needs to be done. Since the college is under the Delhi government, delay in maintaining the infrastructure is a normal thing. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. One Mother Dairy shop is there at the entrance on the right side of the college. The hostel is affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in the hostel is good enough. We get Wi-Fi facility. Library might start soon after renovation. We have a gym with adequate equipment. There is a mother dairy for milk and snacks. Medical officers with MBBS degrees are there for health-related problems.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University.
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi in the college for students of all UG and PG courses. Labs available for all B.Pharma and BMLT students are well-organised. Classrooms are also good. The library is more good and a peaceful place in the college. The hostel facility is also good. The rooms of the hostel are of moderate size with furniture attached. The mess food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, DPSRU has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Overall infrastructure of our college is good. It is neither bad nor very good. Few buildings are a little old and few are new. Hostel has a Wi-Fi facility with good network speed, but sometimes it lags. However, labs are equipped with necessary apparatus and instruments, but some labs lack air-conditioners. Classrooms are well-maintained with air-conditioners, projectors, desks, and boards.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus placement and better college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is average. This college does not have a large campus. Moreover, there is only one playground in our college for all sports. Our college has good classrooms each classroom has a smartboard. Hostel food of our college is not too good and also has poor hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: The campus area is very small.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is top-notch and the college provides everything that is required in pharmacy. Classrooms are good and big. They have Wi-Fi which students can access. Library is good and has all the books related to pharmacy and also has computers which students can avail. There is no canteen in college but a small mother dairy. There are medical facilities as there is OPD in the college and have a sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: Good but a bit expensive (according to government college) college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms are spacious, there is no internet provided to students in college, but we do get free Wi-Fi in the hostel. The library is too good. There is no shortage of books, we can issue books for 30 days. Hence, it helps students who cannot afford pricey books.

reviews.review_heading: Top 16 in NIRF Ranking But No Good Placements.
reviews.review_text: Lecture Theatre (LT) rooms are air-conditioned, and the labs are also pretty good. No availability of Wi-Fi. The library is pretty good compared to other departments of our college. A large number of books are available there, and the library is fully air-conditioned. The availability of internet surfing is also there.

reviews.review_heading: University is absolutely amazing .
reviews.review_text: We have an OPD in our college, where patient flow is good enough to help us learn clinicals. We have a library in our university. Also, we have drinking water and a Wi-Fi connection. Labs are also there, which are very clean and equipped with all kinds of necessary equipment. Hostel facilities are provided by the university, which has both girls' and boys' hostels on the campus itself. The hostel has its own mess facility, drinking water, washrooms, bathrooms, and a Wi-Fi connection. The hostel ...

reviews.review_heading: DPSRU is good for B.Pharma and BPT and also good for placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Well-furnished labs in DPSRU and all instruments are available in the lab with the best facilities. The hostel has a good environment, and all rooms are well colored with a table, fan, chair, bed, etc. Mess is available in the hostel and canteen in college, and the sports ground is a little bit small, but outdoor games areas are sufficient.

reviews.review_heading: DPSRU - A short review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is a little small. The lecture theaters are good and have air conditioning. The university labs are also very good, and students can do research whenever they want, as all the lab equipment and chemicals are available.

reviews.review_heading: My honest views on Pharmacy College DIPSAR.
reviews.review_text: DPSRU boasts a well-stocked library with a vast collection of academic and research books, journals, and digital resources. The university has state-of-the-art laboratories equipped with the latest instruments. The campus supports advanced research through specialized research centers and labs that cater to M.Pharm and Ph.D. students. The university offers hostel facilities for both male and female students, with WiFi and other basic amenities available. The mess food is good, but you may have t...

reviews.review_heading: Overall satisfied because of very good academic values and low fees.
reviews.review_text: The university has a good library with free Wi-Fi access. It also has laboratories for fields like pharmaceutical chemistry, pharmacology, and pharmaceutics. The university has sports facilities and ongoing construction for research facilities. A part of the university infrastructure is still under development in preparation for introducing nursing courses in future years.

data.description: Yes , Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University offers hostel facilities with separate hostel buildings for boys and girls. Hostel fees at DPSRU Delhi are INR 10,000 for UG Courses and INR 11,000 for PG Courses. Furthermore, students must pay a security fee of INR 5,000 and a Mess fee of INR 15,000 per semester.

The total tuition fee for Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University MBA is INR 1.4 lakh. MBA fee is a sum of mutiple components such as caution deposit, hostel charges, exam fee, etc. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 in the start to register for a programme.
